title: US Real Estate Transactions Coordinator
description:
Looking for generous commissions? Feeling stuck in your current job with no growth, bonuses, or real opportunities?



Worry no more! We are looking for a driven, detail-oriented Transaction Coordinator to join a high-performing real estate team that closes 100+ deals a year, led by ICON Agent Wayne Hartard (top 3% of 90,000+ eXp agents).



What You’ll Do:

Manage and streamline 150+ transactions, keep clients updated, coordinate inspections/repairs, ensure timely documents, and help deliver smooth closings.



Why You’ll Love It:

Competitive hourly pay (U.S. client) based on experience

Weekly pay + bonuses

Paid training

100% work-from-home

Fast-paced, supportive team culture



We are looking for:

- 5+ years of experience as a Transaction Coordinator (US Real Estate experience required)

- Background in a Mortgage Company, with experience as a Mortgage Underwriter, Title Underwriter, or Reviewer

- MUST HAVE Hands-on experience with MLS platforms (Flex and Matrix)

- Proven experience handling transactions in attorney states

- Thrives in a fast-paced environment with no attendance issues

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to take constructive feedback positively

title: Digital Ads + Media Buyer (Google, Meta, LinkedIn) + SMM Experience
description:

We are looking for a Digital Ads & Media Buyer with Social Media Management experience to help manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns for multiple client accounts.



You will be responsible for handling paid media campaigns across multiple platforms while also supporting social media marketing efforts when needed.



This role requires someone who is analytical, organized, and comfortable managing multiple client campaigns at once.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns

• Manage Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) campaigns

• Run and monitor LinkedIn Ads campaigns

• Assist with social media marketing and content support

• Set up new campaigns and ad sets

• Monitor campaign performance and KPIs

• Optimize campaigns for ROAS, CPA, and conversions

• Manage campaigns across 6–7 client accounts

• Provide insights and recommendations to improve campaign performance

Strong plus if you also have experience with:

• TikTok (platform familiarity or ad experience)

• Canva (creating simple ad creatives and social media assets)

• Proven experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads

• Experience or familiarity with LinkedIn Ads

• Experience in Social Media Marketing (SMM)

• Ability to manage multiple campaigns and client accounts

• Strong understanding of paid media optimization and analytics

• Organized, detail-oriented, and results-driven



Work Setup

Remote Position

Start as Part-Time (20 hours per week)

Potential to scale depending on performance and business needs



Compensation

$5 – $8 per hour

Rate will depend on experience and qualifications



How to Apply

1. Your experience running paid ads (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)

title: Bookkeeping / Admin VA
description:
I am looking for a highly organized, assertive, and proactive Administrative / Bookkeeping Coordinator to support the operations of industrial property portfolios. This role blends strong administrative support with basic accounting and bookkeeping responsibilities. 



Responsibilities



- Provide administrative support for industrial property operations, including scheduling, documentation, and coordination

- Manage basic bookkeeping tasks such as expense tracking, invoice organization, and financial record maintenance

- Assist with system and process creation to improve scheduling, bookkeeping, and administrative workflows

- Ensure all tenants maintain active Certificates of Insurance (COIs), verify compliance, and confirm proper listing of ownership/additional insured requirements

- Track COI expiration dates and proactively follow up to maintain continuous compliance

- Schedule and coordinate leasing meetings and related communications

- Maintain organized digital records using tools such as Google Docs, Google Sheets, and Google Calendar

- Support calendar management and scheduling for property-related meetings and deadlines

- Communicate with tenants, vendors, and internal stakeholders in a professional and timely manner

- Identify gaps, inefficiencies, or risks in current systems and confidently propose improvements

- Handle general administrative tasks as needed to support daily operations



Required Qualifications / Skills



- 3 years + experience as an Administrative Assistant, Bookkeeper, Accounting Assistant, or similar role

- Experience handling full-cycle bookkeeping within QuickBooks.

- Strong understanding of basic accounting and bookkeeping principles

- High level of organization with exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

- Confidence managing compliance-related tasks such as insurance documentation

- Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendars)

- Ability to create, document, and improve systems and processes

- Assertive, solution-oriented mindset with the confidence to bring ideas forward

- Strong verbal and written communication skills

- Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines independently

- Comfortable working with minimal supervision and taking ownership of responsibilities



Schedule and Time Zone



- Full-time, 40 hours per week

- Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time

title: Part-Time Sales Caller & Outreach Assistant (UK Construction Company)
description:
We are a UK-based construction and refurbishment company looking for a reliable Sales Caller & Outreach Assistant to help us connect with companies in the construction and property industry.



Your role will be to call companies from our contact database, introduce our company, and send follow-up
s to build relationships and identify potential project opportunities.



This is not aggressive sales. The goal is to build professional relationships and identify companies that may need our services in the future.



?



Responsibilities



• Call companies from our contact list

• Introduce our company and services

• Ask to speak with the correct person (architect, project manager, estimator, director etc.)

• Send our company introduction
 when appropriate

• Follow up with companies after sending
s

• Record notes and outcomes for each contact

• Identify potential opportunities or projects



?



Training & Support



Full training will be provided.



You will receive a clear structure and blueprint for how the outreach process works, including:



• Step-by-step guidance for calls

• Scripts for introducing the company

•
 templates already prepared

• Instructions on how to send and follow up
s

• CRM structure for tracking contacts



You will be trained on how to approach companies, how to speak with decision makers, and how to follow up professionally.



You will not need to create scripts or
s yourself — everything will be provided.



?



Tools Provided



All tools required for the role will be provided.



This includes:



• A UK phone number to make calls from

• Access to our contact database

•
 templates and outreach scripts

• CRM system to track calls and follow-ups



You will not need to use your personal phone number.

All calls will be made through the company phone system.



?



Compensation



This role includes a base payment plus performance bonuses.



Base pay:

$100 per month



Performance bonuses include:



• Bonus when a meeting is arranged with a company

• Bonus when a company introduces us to a project opportunity

• Larger bonus if a project is secured through that contact



This role has strong earning potential for candidates who perform well.



?



Daily Activity Expectations



• Make outbound calls to companies

• Send introduction
s when appropriate

• Follow up with companies that received
s

• Record call outcomes and notes



The goal is to identify companies that may need refurbishment or construction services.



?



Requirements



• Excellent spoken English

• Confident speaking on the phone

• Friendly and professional communication style

• Organized and reliable

• Comfortable making outbound calls



Experience in sales, telemarketing or appointment setting is a plus but not required.



?

To confirm you read this job description, please start your application with the word:



“Lyon”

title: Instagram VA
description:
Instagram Virtual Assistant (Content, Reels & DM Automations)

About the role

I’m looking for an experienced Instagram Virtual Assistant to support the day-to-day management of my Instagram account. 

You will be responsible for turning raw content into polished posts, publishing reels, and setting up comment-to-DM automations for lead generation.



Responsibilities

1. Content Creation – Carousel Posts

Transform raw content provided into Instagram carousel posts

Design carousel visuals using Canva or similar tools

Write clear, engaging captions aligned with the brand tone

Add relevant hashtags

Publish content according to the agreed posting schedule



2. Video Posting – Reels

Post 30–90 second videos provided (no editing required)

Post 30–90 second videos provided and add text overlays where required

Write engaging Reel captions

Apply relevant hashtags

Publish Reels consistently to the agreed schedule



3. Comment-to-DM Automations

Create posts with clear CTAs (e.g. “Comment YES to receive a free guide”)

Set up Instagram comment-to-DM automations to the agreed schedule

Requirements

Good written English (clear, natural, and professional)

Proven experience with similar above listed Instagram responsibilities

Experience creating content with Canva (or similar design tools)

Experience with native Instagram DM automations and/or extrenal tool (e.g. ManyChat or similar tools)

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions

Reliable, organised, and consistent with posting schedules



Around 10-20h each week



To Apply – Please Answer the Following

Please provide examples of Instagram accounts you have created content for 

Confirm - Do you have experience setting up Instagram comment-to-DM automations? If yes, which tools have you used? Do you have experience with Canva (or similar tool)

Please confirm how much time it would take you to manage the following workload:

At least 1 carousel post per day

At least 3 videos (Reels) per week

At least 1 comment-to-DM automation per week

title: Graphic & Video Designer (Adobe Experience Required)
description:

title: Meta (Facebook) Ads Launcher/Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company selling physical products across multiple African countries.



Our business includes structured internal systems for:



• order management

• advertising performance tracking

• inventory management

• logistics and delivery operations



We primarily advertise through Meta 
 & Instagram).



Our internal operations are conducted in French, but working knowledge of English is acceptable.



The Role



We are looking for a Meta Ads Operator / Media Buyer to monitor and manage our advertising campaigns daily.



This is primarily an execution-focused role. You will follow a structured internal system to monitor performance and optimize campaigns.



Your main mission will be to help us scale profitable ads while maintaining cost efficiency.





Responsibilities



Your daily tasks will include:



• Launching advertising campaigns prepared by the team

• Monitoring campaign performance throughout the day

• Pausing ads that exceed our cost thresholds

• Duplicating winning ads to scale them

• Managing campaign structure and organization

• Reporting key metrics and daily results



You will follow a clear SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) for campaign management and scaling.





Work Schedule



This is a full-time role.



Main working hours:



07:30 AM – 04:00 PM (GMT+1 – West Africa Time)



Our campaigns are usually launched around 07:54 AM.



Occasionally, light monitoring of campaigns may be required in the evening as our sales operations can run until 22:30.





Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



• Has experience with Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

• Understands CTR, CPC, CPA and ROAS metrics

• Is comfortable managing multiple campaigns and ad sets

• Is detail-oriented and disciplined

• Can follow structured operational systems and SOPs

• Is comfortable working with Google Sheets tracking systems



Basic understanding of French is preferred but not mandatory, as our internal operations are conducted in French.



The role requires availability during our main advertising hours 

from 07:30 to 16:00 (GMT+1).



Compensation



Monthly salary:



$300 – $400 depending on experience



Performance bonuses may be offered as the company scales.



This role can evolve into a Senior Media Buyer or Head of Ads position as the company grows.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 3a
description:

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: Agile Functional Tester (Web, API & End-to-End)
description:
Are you a detail-obsessed QA tester who loves catching bugs before they reach production?

Do you thrive in an Agile team environment where your work directly impacts product quality and user trust?

We’re looking for a QA Functional Tester to join a Canadian FINTECH company through L’EVATE Inc., a staffing partner connecting top Filipino talent with global businesses.



Why This Role is Exciting

This isn’t just another QA job. You’ll be working on web platforms, APIs, and backend systems that power real-world financial solutions. Your testing expertise will ensure our applications are reliable, scalable, and user-friendly.

You’ll collaborate with developers, product owners, and automation testers — helping shape quality standards across the entire SDLC.



What You’ll Do

• Design, execute, and maintain manual test cases for web apps, APIs, and backend systems

• Perform functional, integration, regression, and exploratory testing

• Ensure traceability between user stories, test cases, and defects

• Run end-to-end test scenarios and validate data integrity

• Log and manage defects using Jira/Azure DevOps

• Join Agile ceremonies (sprint planning, daily standups, retrospectives)

• Communicate risks and testing progress with clear reports



What We’re Looking For

• 3–6 years QA functional testing experience (manual, web + API)

• Strong understanding of Agile SDLC (Scrum/Kanban)

• Skilled at writing clear and comprehensive test cases

• Experience with Postman, Swagger, or Fiddler for API testing

• Familiar with defect tracking in Jira or Azure DevOps

• Excellent communication skills and attention to detail

• Ability to work EST Time Zone



Nice-to-Haves

• Degree/Diploma in Computer Science, IT, or related

title: Insurance Collections Specialist
description:
#Direct Client

#PST Hours ONLY



The Insurance Collections Specialist is a proactive problem-solver responsible for managing the accounts receivable lifecycle and ensuring accurate reimbursement from third-party payers. You will investigate claim denials, file strategic appeals, and resolve billing discrepancies to maintain the clinic’s financial health. This role requires a blend of technical coding knowledge and persistent communication to turn outstanding claims into recovered revenue.



Monitor Accounts Receivable (AR) aging reports to identify unpaid claims and prioritize follow-up based on dollar amount and timely filing limits.



Investigate denied, rejected, or partially paid claims by reviewing payer portals and communicating directly with insurance representatives.



Resubmit corrected claims with necessary documentation, such as medical records, invoices, or Certificates of Medical Necessity.



Manage the appeals process, drafting formal appeal letters for clinical or administrative denials.  



Verify insurance coverage and benefits when discrepancies arise during the billing cycle to ensure accurate claim adjudication.



Identify and report recurring payer trends that lead to denials, assisting the management team in proactive "clean claim" strategies.



Maintain updated knowledge of ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS codes, as well as evolving payer-specific policies.



Document all collection activity clearly and concisely within the Practice Management (PM) system. 



Process adjustments and write-offs in accordance with clinic policy and contractual obligations.



Collaborate with the Coding and Authorization departments to resolve root-cause issues that prevent payment.



Screening Questions



How many years of experience do you have with Insurance Collections or Accounts Receivable follow-up in a US medical billing environment?



Please list the Practice Management systems, clearinghouses, or payer portals you have used and indicate your proficiency level (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced).



How often did you work AR aging reports, follow up on denied claims, and resolve insurance payment discrepancies in your previous roles?

(Daily / Weekly / Monthly)



What is your level of familiarity with ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding standards, as well as payer-specific billing regulations?

Please rate your knowledge on a scale of 1 to 5 (1 = no knowledge, 5 = expert).



Please send your updated resume and answers to the screening questions below to: (

title: Senior Sales Representative (Closer)
description:
Little Pixies Studios is on a mission to make every child become the hero of their own story through magical photography experiences.



At Little Pixies, we don’t just hire for open roles… we hire for impact. If you’re exceptional at what you do and align with our core values: competitive greatness, sincere candour, and unimpeachable character, we want to know you.



Important Do NOT apply if you aren’t confident speaking fluent English with a clear UK/US accent



This role is NOT high volume dialling, our customers are VIPs and this role requires English as a first language i.e. UK / US / international school English accent that UK customers can trust. This is non-negotiable and we will request a short voice sample early in the process.



Role



We’re looking for a Senior Sales Lead to join our photography studio team! As an SDR you’ll be responsible for turning inbound enquiries into booked photoshoots.



We believe in high standards, hard work, and helping others win. If that resonates, you’ll feel at home here.



You’ll own the inbound sales process, move fast on new enquiries, and selling session bookings to prospective families.  You’ll be the first voice new clients hear from Little Pixies.



This is an ownership role. You’ll be accountable for bookings and conversion, and expected to drive success, grow the sales team and improve how the system works.



Who this is role for:



You are a top performing sales rep at your current company

You have worked in or owned a startup/ small business

You are extremely hard working

You are looking for growth



What we offer you:



Sales training & coaching

Performance based career growth (we have more opportunity than we can handle)

Uncapped commission



What we expect from you:



Responsibilities



High work ethic (6 day work week)

Follow and improve our sales call process

Build rapport, manage your pipeline and follow up properly.

Secure bookings into the studio calendar and take booking deposits



Results



Exceed minimum close rate

Minimum of 15 sessions sold per week



Requirements



Exceptional English accent and spoken English language skill 

1-2 year minimum of experience in transactional sales (preferably in luxury sales to emotional buyers, e.g. luxury car sales, weight loss sales)

Exceptional over the phone (this is a requirement)

Self-sufficient and able to manage and prioritise one's own time

Open to learning new processes in sales







Location

Remote. Must work UK hours. Contractor role.







Days and Hours

Availability 09:00–19:00 UK Tuesday–Sunday.





Compensation

?35k Base per month + uncapped commission

OTE ?60k - ?85k+ per month 



How to apply?

Do not apply through OLJ, please apply directly 



Core Values

Our core values are the heart and soul of this incredible company. The right person for this role will appreciate each of these values, personally subscribe to them, and understand why each is critical to having a great business.



Competitive Greatness



Be at your best when your best is needed. Enjoyment of a hard challenge. Those who have the drive to constantly improve, the superior intellect and long term commitment to see incremental improvements become compounding returns.



Sincere Candour



Have the self awareness to accurately perceive and communicate hard truths that improve others and self, the courage to do so, and the humility to accept them, even when it hurts. Nothing great can be built without feedback: internally or externally.



Unimpeachable Character



Be the type of person with whom people are always proud to associate, personally and professionally. We look for true alignment of thoughts, words, and actions towards a goal worth pursuing.

description:

Submit your application here >>

title: TikTok Video Editor (U.S. Market)
description:
We are looking for an experienced TikTok video editor to help us create short-form content for our brand of books for couples.

Our goal is to create engaging, scroll-stopping content focused on the U.S. TikTok market, with the objective of driving organic traffic to 
 and increasing book sales.

We are looking for someone who thinks beyond simple editing and understands how to create content that captures attention and retains viewers.

This is intended to be a long-term collaboration, as our brand is growing quickly and we want to expand our team with talented people who can help us scale.



1) What You Will Do



Your main task will be editing short TikTok videos using the assets we provide.

We will send you:

• Product clips

• Snitch clips (scroll-stopping hooks)

• Images and videos of the book interior and cover

• Clips showing people writing inside the book

The editing style is simple product-focused content (not UGC).



Typical videos will combine:

• Snitch clip

• Book interior pages

• Cover of the book

• Hands flipping pages or writing inside the book

• On-screen text



These books are interactive couple albums, so the visual storytelling is important.

At the beginning we will provide the text overlays, but later we would like you to propose catchy text ideas based on what performs best on the account. The same with the snitch clips.



Your role will also include testing different styles, identifying what performs best, and then replicating the winning formats.

TikTok penalizes duplicate content, so it is extremely important that you are a very organized person.

You must be careful not to reuse the same clips or combinations repeatedly in ways that could create duplicate content issues.



2) Additional Content Creation



Besides product videos, we will also need another type of content:

iMessage/Instagram DM/WhatsApp-style conversations between couples.

We will initially send you example screenshots of conversations.



From there, we would like you to:

• Create new conversation ideas

• Generate the conversation images

• Deliver them cropped and ready to post



Each conversation should be divided into 7–8 images (depen on the length of the conversation)

We will also need video versions of these conversations, for example:



• One person sends a message

• We see the other person typing

• The reply appears

• The conversation builds tension

• The product appears at the end

• Sometimes we may start the video with a snitch clip hook before the conversation begins.



We will send some snitch clip examples, but we also want someone resourceful who can find additional hook clips when needed.

Please confirm that you have access to iMessage/Instagra
ssage or WhatsApp and that you are able to generate these types of conversation visuals and you can record your own screen to create these videos. (!) Very important.



3) Workflow



We will provide all the clips and assets you need. We are looking for someone who can produce short videos of around 15 seconds. Your job will be to continuously produce content during your working time.

If you work 4 hours, we expect you to produce multiple finished TikTok videos ready to upload.



Please answer in your application:

Approximately how many TikTok videos do you think you can produce per day (4h)?



4) Deliverables

We need files that are ready to upload directly to TikTok.



This includes:

• Correct format

• Proper dimensions

• High quality content (Good resolution)

• Final edited version



Our content targets the U.S. market, so it is very important that you are familiar with:

• U.S. TikTok style

• Tone and slang

• Viral content formats



5) Requirements (! IMPORTANT)



To apply, please include the following:

1. Examples of TikTok videos you have edited

2. TikTok accounts you have worked with

3. Confirm that you have read the full job post

4. Include the word COUPLE in your application

5. Tell us if you have experience creating content for the U.S. market

6. Confirm that you can create WhatsApp-style conversations and record your own mobile screen

7. Answer the question: How many videos can you realistically produce per day?

8. How do you usually edit your videos? What editing software do you use? What phone or device model do you use for editing?

Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.



6) Long-Term Opportunity



We are building a growing brand and are looking for someone who wants to work with us long-term.

If the collaboration works well, there will be continuous work and increasing volume and hours.



Thank you!

title: UGC Content Creator – AI Tech Startup (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts)

Job Description:

We're hiring 10-15 creative, energetic content creators to help us launch Orca — a global AI network that pays people passive income just for keeping their laptop plugged in. Think of it like mining crypto, but instead of wasting electricity, your computer is doing real AI work.

Your job is to create short-form video and photo content that explains this concept in a way that's exciting, relatable, and shareable — no technical background needed.

TikTok and Instagram Reels (30-90 seconds) showing how Orca works and how much people are earning

YouTube Shorts and reaction-style videos to trending AI/passive income content

Screenshot-style slideshows and carousel posts

Comment seeding on relevant posts in the AI, passive income, and tech spaces

Voiceovers, screen recordings, and talking-head videos explaining Orca simply



What we're looking for:



Comfortable on camera OR skilled at editing (both is a bonus)

Speaks natural, conversational English

Has a smartphone and basic editing app (CapCut is fine)

Understands TikTok and Instagram trends — you watch these platforms daily

Fast turnaround — we move quickly and reward people who deliver

Bonus if you have your own following or have done UGC work before



What we provide:



All scripts, talking points, and creative briefs — you never have to figure out what to say

Raw footage, screen recordings, and visual assets when needed

Clear feedback so your content keeps improving

Opportunity to grow with the company — top performers get bonuses and increased rates

Weekly pay via PayPal or Wise



This is a high-energy startup launch role. We're building something that's going to be talked about globally. If you're someone who wants to be part of something from the ground floor and get paid well for creative work, this is for you.

To apply, please include:



2-3 examples of content you've made (TikTok links, Instagram Reels, or any video work)

One sentence explaining why passive income content would be easy for you to talk about

Your available hours per week

title: C++ Audio Developer
description:
C++ Audio Developer



We're looking for a highly skilled C++ audio developer with strong JUCE experience to join Vox Samples as a full-time member of our engineering team. You'll be working closely with the Founder & CEO to build and continuously develop premium audio plugins used by music producers worldwide. You'll be a long-term part of a fast-growing audio software brand, contributing to our plugin suite from day one.



Vox Samples is an Australia-based audio software company focused on helping music producers work faster with intuitive, professional tools. With 150,000+ active users and 1,300+ 5-star reviews, we're growing quickly and building a world-class product lineup — and we need a talented developer to grow with us.



What you'll do:

1. Develop and maintain audio plugins using C++ and the JUCE framework

2. Implement and refine DSP algorithms and signal processing chains to a professional standard

3. Build responsive, pixel-accurate plugin UIs that match our visual designs

4. Ensure stable, low-latency performance across all major DAWs (Ableton, Logic, FL Studio, etc.)

5. Manage VST3, AU, and AAX builds across macOS and Windows

6. Write clean, well-documented, maintainable code

7. Collaborate directly with the Founder/CEO on new features and future releases

8. Contribute to a growing product roadmap with multiple plugins planned





What we're looking for:

1. Strong hands-on experience with JUCE and C++ audio development

2. Solid understanding of DSP fundamentals and real-time audio processing

3. Ability to implement UIs faithfully from supplied design assets

4. Experience shipping commercial plugins or audio software products

5. Cross-platform development experience (macOS and Windows)

6. Self-motivated, reliable, and comfortable working in a lean, fast-moving team

7. Strong communication and the ability to work independently





Bonus points if you have:

1. A portfolio of published commercial plugins

2. Experience with preset management, DAW automation, and parameter handling

3. A track record of optimising DSP for CPU efficiency and low-latency performance

4. Understanding of what makes audio tools genuinely intuitive for music producers





What we offer:

1. Full-time, ongoing role with a growing audio software brand

2. Work directly with the Founder & CEO — your work will matter and be seen

3. Contribute to a real commercial product with an established, loyal user base

4. A long-term position with increasing responsibility as the product line grows

5. Be part of a brand already trusted by 150,000+ producers worldwide

title: Affiliate Manager (Must Have Existing Affiliate or Creator Network)
description:
Promofy is recruiting Affiliate Managers who already operate affiliate or creator networks they can activate.



This role is designed for operators who are comfortable being judged on output, not effort.



You will recruit promoters, activate them, and drive mission completion for brand campaigns.



This role is NOT a training role. Candidates must already have recruiting leverage.



What You Will Do



• Recruit promoters from your existing affiliate or creator network

• Activate promoters to complete brand missions

• Monitor promoter performance and remove underperformers

• Enforce compliance, suspensions, and bans when necessary

• Maintain consistent mission completion volume



You are accountable for quality, volume, and trust.



This role requires independent operators who can make decisions without escalation.



Compensation

$2,500 – $3,500 / month



Core Operator Range

$3,500 – $5,000 / month



Senior / Lead Operator

Up to $6,500 / month based on performance



Additional performance bonuses are earned based on completed missions by your promoters.

Qualified candidates will receive the next step of the application process.

title: AI-Native Operations Architect (Tier-1 Client Management)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines Only)

Shift: US Business Hours (EST/PST)

?[The Objective]

We are a high-growth agency (The Tony-Jarvis Team) serving Tier-1 founders and real estate firms in the USA and UK. We don't do "manual labor"—we build "Logic." We are looking for a Filipino professional who thinks like an Architect and executes with the speed of AI.

?[Your Role: The Logic Engine]

You will not just "do tasks." You will manage the Workflows that keep our clients' businesses running. Your primary goal is to use LLMs (ChatGPT/Claude) and raw logic to automate 80% of your daily output.

?Content Multiplier: Turning raw client transcripts/videos into high-authority LinkedIn and X content using advanced prompting (No 3rd-party wrappers).

title: SEO Content Writer (Freelance / Contract)
description:
We’re looking for a skilled SEO Content Writer to produce high-quality, search-optimised content that builds authority, drives organic traffic, and supports commercial growth.

This is a freelance/contract position paid per article, ideal for a writer who understands SEO fundamentals, EEAT principles, and can translate complex topics into clear, engaging content tailored to defined audiences.

You will work to structured briefs aligned with our monthly content themes and business priorities.

 

 

Compensation Structure

1. Payment is per approved article.

2. Rate will vary depending on:

 a. Word count (e.g. 1,000–2,500+ words)

 b. Research depth required

 c. Complexity of topic

 d. Inclusion of supporting research or expert references

3. Clear scope and word count expectations will be provided upfront.

4. Payment made upon approval of final submitted draft.



Articles will need to align to the following structure:

Write long-form, SEO-optimised articles aligned with provided briefs.

Ensure content is:

Easily consumable and well-structured.

Written for a defined audience persona.

Clear when explaining complex or technical topics.

Grammatically strong and aligned with brand tone.

Incorporate primary and secondary keywords naturally.

Structure content to meet Google’s EEAT principles.

Write across various SEO-focused formats, including:

In-depth guides

Listicles

“What is” explainers

“How to” articles

Comparison pieces

Industry insight articles

 

Deliver 100% original content.

Ensure content is not AI-generated.

Fact-check claims and cite credible sources.

Align content with any relevant regulatory or industry requirements.

Provide short-form social media copy to promote each published article.

title: Ecom AI Performance Video Editor
description:
We are 7 Figure is looking for a D2C Supplement Brand Video Editor looking to join our team! As our video editing specialist, you will be responsible for editing high-converting UGC ads, direct response video creatives,VSL’s and psychology-based video content to be used across paid marketing channels (primarily Meta).



We are looking to hire someone with 1.5+ years of ecommerce work experience. The ideal candidate has prior experience editing paid advertisements specifically for Meta Platforms, UGC content,VSL’s direct response marketing & bonus points if experience with supplement/health brands.



Key Objectives:



-Edit 1-15 high-converting video ads per week from raw UGC footage and stock content

-Transform raw creator footage into polished, direct response ads optimized for Meta platforms

-Drive measurable improvements in core advertising metrics (CTR, Hook Rate, Hold Rate) through superior editing

-Create multiple variations and iterations of winning ad concepts quickly

-Use data from creative performance on Meta to analyze what editing techniques, hooks, and structures are driving results

-Work with our creative strategist to bring scripts and concepts to life through compelling editing

-Maintain organized asset libraries and editing workflows for maximum efficiency

-Provide quick turnaround times on revisions and new edits to support rapid testing cycles



Requirements:



-Fully remote

-Fluent in English

-Direct Response Editing Expertise: 1.5+ Years experience editing performance creative for DTC brands or working at a creative agency is a must

-Software Proficiency: Expert-level skills in Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects or CapCut, Heygen, Veo 3, Higgfield is a must and familiarity with DaVinci Resolve. Mobile editing experience (CapCut mobile) is a plus

-UGC Editing: Extensive experience editing raw UGC footage into high-converting paid ads with native platform aesthetics

-Fast & Efficient: Ability to produce high-quality edits quickly without sacrificing performance. Speed is critical

-Creative & Data-Driven: Understanding of what makes ads perform (hooks, pacing, captions, sound design, effects) and ability to analyze performance data to inform editing decisions

-Portfolio Required: Must provide portfolio showcasing DTC video ads (preferably supplements, health, or e-commerce)

-No issue working overtime or on the weekends if needed. You wouldn't know what to do with your free time if you were working less. You are passionate about your work

-Excellent cultural fit as per our values above

-Are excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders

-Understanding of direct response principles and how editing impacts conversion

-Include word "banana" in your application to prove your legit



Accountabilities:



-Edit 10-20 video ads per week from provided scripts, raw footage, and assets

-Create multiple variations of winning ads (different hooks, text overlays, pacing)

-Add compelling captions, text overlays, sound effects, and visual effects that enhance performance

-Maintain consistent turnaround times (24-48 hours for standard edits, same-day for urgent)

-Organize and manage all video assets, footage libraries, and project files

-Collaborate with creative strategist to understand video concepts and execute the vision

Source and integrate b-roll, stock footage, and motion graphics as needed

-Adapt editing style to emerging trends and platform best practices

-Review performance data on edited ads and identify patterns in what's working

-Iterate quickly on underperforming ads and create new versions based on data insights

-Create editing templates and systems to increase output efficiency

-Maintain brand consistency across all video content while optimizing for performance



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate:



When hiring, we'll work with you to define the KPIs you'll be responsible for and set targets. This removes ambiguity around wondering if you're doing a good job after you start.



Initial soft interview, then a technical interview + test project (edit 2-3 ads from provided footage), and a final interview to ensure culture fit. We plan to hire within ~8 - 10 days of conducting these interviews. We pride ourselves on timely responses and updates for applicants.



For this specific role, we will walk you through the long-term vision and opportunities that have us excited about this business - and how you fit in. We will show you our current structure and where we are headed!

mbers

title: Creator Content Manager (Full-Time)
description:
Full-time. Global remote. Start date: ASAP.



About ARDANT

Jewelry you never take off. 130,000+ customers across the US, UK, Australia, and Canada in under 1.5 years. Our team has scaled brands from launch to eight figures and beyond. See our work at 
.



The Role

Our paid creative engine runs fast. This role keeps it fed. 

You'll sit inside our in-house creative team, working directly with our Creative Strategist to source content built for paid social. You own the creator side end-to-end. Finding the right people, negotiating rates, briefing them strategically, and making sure what gets made is exactly what the team needs.

You know TikTok and Instagram like a native. You understand what performs for women in English-speaking markets and use that instinct to inform every brief you write.

Paid social is the primary focus. There's scope to grow into organic social, the website, and beyond.

Full-time, Monday to Friday. Global remote. Start date: ASAP.



What You'll Own

1. Creator sourcing, briefing, and negotiation. Find and vet the right creators. Write briefs that get results, not just followed. 

Negotiate rates, manage budgets, and own the relationship from first contact to final delivery.

2. Creator roster management. Manage an established creator roster. Know who's performing, keep them aligned, and develop the strongest into deeper brand partnerships.

3. Creative collaboration. Work with our Creative Strategist and in-house creative team. Translate direction into action. Keep the pipeline ahead of demand.

4. Quality control. Last set of eyes before anything moves forward. High bar, every time.



What We're Looking For

Must-haves:

3 to 4 years in creator or influencer management. Briefed, managed, and delivered content that performed. Not just sent DMs.

Native understanding of TikTok and Instagram content for women in English-speaking markets.

D2C or e-commerce background. Fashion, beauty, or women's lifestyle especially.

Sharp communicator. Inside a fast-moving team and externally with creators.

Strategic instinct. You think about why content will work, not just whether it looks good.

Organized under pressure. Multiple creators, briefs, deadlines. Nothing drops.



Bonus points:

Experience across US, UK, Australian, or Canadian markets.

Worked inside a performance or creative team.

Comfortable with influencer platforms and sourcing tools.



Why Join ARDANT

We're scaling fast and building a team for the long run. Full-time, 40 hours a week, with real ownership and room to grow.

Your work goes live fast. You see the impact in real time.

Real ownership. You run a function that directly shapes what the brand puts out.

Senior team that has taken brands from zero to eight figures. You'll be learning from people who've done it.

Fully remote. Flexible hours.



How to Apply

We're hiring fast. Strong applicants hear from us first.

The Role:

We’re looking for a proactive, results-driven Media Buyer who will not just follow instructions but help drive the company’s growth. You’ll be expected to think critically, find your own solutions, and actively contribute to scaling and optimizing our ad campaigns. If you're a fast thinker, deeply invested in the success of the company, and passionate about building solutions together, we want to hear from you.



Your Responsibilities:

• Analyze Data – Track ad performance and make quick, data-driven decisions.

• Kill or Scale Ads – Identify which ads should be stopped or scaled based on performance.

• Test 50+ Products Daily – Manage and optimize new ad campaigns every day.

• Audience Targeting – Research and refine high-converting audiences.

• Budget Optimization – Allocate ad spend for maximum return on investment.

• Real-Time Adjustments – Make quick adjustments to maintain ad performance, 24/7.

• Collaborate with CEO – Work directly with the CEO to define strategy and drive results.

• Think and Act Proactively – Be an active problem-solver and help identify new opportunities for growth.



What We Need:

• Proven, recent experience running
 & Instagram ads for dropshipping brands.

• Recent proof of successful ad campaigns (case studies, performance data, or documents).

• A fast learner, quick thinker, and self-starter with a hands-on attitude.

• Experience managing 50+ campaigns daily and making real-time decisions.

• Strong communication skills – able to work closely with the CEO and provide clear updates.

• Someone who is highly proactive, with a passion for helping the company grow.

• Availability to make 24/7 adjustments to campaigns as needed.

• We do not accept AI-generated applications. If we detect AI in your response, we will ignore it.



What’s In It For You:

• High-performance pay – directly tied to your results.

• Unlimited earning potential – the better your ads perform, the more you earn.

• Opportunity for rapid growth – successful candidates will move into management roles.

• Remote work – work from anywhere, but be available when needed.



How to Apply:

To apply, send us:

1. Your resume.

2. Recent proof of successful ad campaigns you’ve run (include data).

3. Examples of your experience running Meta ads for dropshipping brands (provide links or proof).

4. Note: If you don’t provide your resume and proof, or if we detect AI in your application, your submission will be ignored.



Fun Challenge: To prove you’ve read the full post, include the word "RED" in your application.

title: Executive / Legal Assistant (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a highly organised, proactive Executive / Legal Assistant based in the Philippines who will become a core operational support member of the firm. You will work directly with the principal solicitor to ensure legal matters run smoothly, clients receive excellent service, and internal systems remain organised and efficient.



This role is ideal for someone who takes initiative, builds systems, anticipates needs, and enjoys helping professionals operate efficiently.



We are a general practice law firm based in Queensland, Australia, so versatility and adaptability to providing support across a range of areas will be highly regarded.



.This role is suited to someone who:

- enjoys process improvement, structure, and organisation

- is comfortable working independently in a remote environment

- is interested in modern legal technology, AI tools, and automation

- wants a long-term career supporting a professional services firm



Key responsibilities will include:



Matter Administration (Smokeball) 

- Opening and maintaining legal files

- Recording matter participants and contact details

- Preparing engagement letters and onboarding documents

- Diarising key dates and deadlines



Document Support (Microsoft Word)

- Formatting legal and commercial documents

- Applying tracked edits and completing missing details

Client & Workflow Support

- Assisting with client onboarding (conflict checks, KYC / AML)

- Coordinating meetings and appointments

- Following up outstanding matters to ensure matter progress 



General Administration

- Managing the principal’s calendar 

- Assisting with billing preparation and WIP monitoring

- Organising internal document systems



Skills & Experience 

- Minimum 3 years experience as a Legal Assistant, Paralegal, or Executive Assistant

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

- Ability to work independently in a fully remote role



Highly Valued skills include experience with:

- Australian law firms

- Smokeball practice management system (or similar)

- Microsoft 365

- AI tools such as ChatGPT



Working Arrangement

- Fully remote role (Philippines based)

- Part-time or full-time options available

- Initial 3-month contract with potential long-term role

title: Fulltime Shopify Product Lister
description:

Schedule:

 to confirm that you have read and understood the job requirements. Good luck!

title: Media Buyer| FACEBOOK - META |Dropshipping |Ads Expert
description:
About Us

We are U-S Limited, a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple successful dropshipping stores. Every day, we test 50+ new ad campaigns on
 and Instagram to find high-performing products and scale successful ads.



We are looking for a highly analytical, results-driven, and fast-learning Media Buyer who knows how to read and interpret data, make quick decisions on whether to kill or scale ads, and continuously optimize campaigns.



This is not an agency role. You will be running ads exclusively for our own dropshipping stores, working directly with the CEO to drive sales and profitability. Our ads run 24/7, and we test new products daily. We are constantly learning and improving—so we need someone who is eager to adapt, test new strategies, and grow with us.

 



Your Role

As our Media Buyer, your job is to ensure our ad campaigns generate maximum profitability through data-driven decisions, constant testing, and fast adjustments.

•	Analyze Data – Continuously track ad performance and make real-time decisions.

•	Kill or Scale Ads – Determine which ads should be stopped and which should be scaled based on performance metrics.

•	Test Multiple Products Daily – Launch and manage 50+ new ad campaigns every day.

•	Audience Targeting – Research and refine high-converting audiences.

•	Budget Optimization – Allocate ad spend efficiently for maximum return on investment.

•	A/B Testing – Run experiments with different ad creatives and targeting strategies.

•	Real-Time Adjustments – Ads are live 24/7, so you must be able to adjust quickly to maintain performance.

•	Work Directly with the CEO – Collaborate closely on strategy, decision-making, and campaign optimization.

•	Fast Learning & Adaptation – Stay open to learning new methods and improving processes as the landscape evolves.

 



What We’re Looking For

We need someone who is highly analytical, decisive, results-driven, and quick to learn. You should be able to interpret ad performance metrics and take immediate action while continuously improving your skills.

•	Proven experience running
 and Instagram ads for 
 brands

•	Strong analytical skills – ability to assess data and make fast decisions

•	Experience managing high ad volume, launching and optimizing 50+ campaigns per day

•	Fast learner – open to adapting, testing, and improving along the way

•	Excellent communication – direct collaboration with the CEO, requiring clear and quick responses

•	Availability to work 24/7 – ads run non-stop, and quick decisions are critical

•	Self-motivated and proactive – you take initiative and make decisions without waiting for instructions

 



What’s in It for You?

•	High-performance pay – Your earnings will be directly tied to your results

•	Opportunity for rapid growth – If you perform well, you can move into a management role with higher compensation

•	Work directly with the CEO – Gain hands-on experience with top-level strategy

•	Remote work – Work from anywhere, as long as you are available when needed

•	Unlimited earning potential – The better your ads perform, the more you can earn

•	A chance to learn and grow – We are all improving every day, and you will have the opportunity to refine your skills and test new strategies

 



How to Apply

To apply, send us:

•	Your most successful ad campaign – What made it successful? What key metrics and decisions did you make?

•	Proof of success – Can you provide doc sheets, case studies, or any data supporting your past campaign performance?

•	Your experience running Meta 
 & Instagram) ads for dropshipping brands (provide us store links/proof)



Fun Challenge: To prove you’ve read the full post, include the word "RED" somewhere in your application.

title: Expert Shopify Website Developer
description:
We are a growing e-commerce company looking for a highly experienced Shopify Developer/Designer to replicate a specific reference website exactly 1-1.



If you are a beginner or rely on basic pre-made templates without the ability to customize them pixel-perfectly, please do not apply. We need someone who has a sharp eye for detail and can deliver an exact clone of the design, layout, and functionality provided.



Your Responsibilities:



Build and design a Shopify store that is a 100% exact match (1-1) to the reference website we will provide.



Ensure the site is fully responsive and looks perfect on both desktop and mobile devices.



Optimize the website for fast loading speeds.



Install and configure necessary apps to match the functionality of the reference site.



Requirements:



Proven, extensive experience in Shopify website design and development (Liquid coding experience is a major plus).



A strong portfolio showcasing previous Shopify websites you have built from scratch or heavily customized.



Extreme attention to detail—the final result must be a pixel-perfect replication.



Good communication skills and the ability to meet deadlines.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this entire job post, please include the word "PIXEL" at the very beginning of your subject line or application message.



In your proposal, you MUST include:



A brief summary of your Shopify experience.



Links to your portfolio or at least 3-5 live Shopify websites you have designed/built.



Applications without a portfolio will be automatically ignored.

description:

 paid social campaigns across
 and Instagram for a range of clients. This is a great opportunity for someone who takes ownership of their work and thrives in a collaborative, fast-paced environment.

What You'll Do



Set up and manage Meta ad campaigns 
 & Instagram) across various client accounts

1–2 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Strong competitor research skills — ability to analyse competitor ads using Meta Ad Library and other tools

title: Customer Service Operations Manager (Systems & Strategy Focus)
description:
This is NOT a support agent role. 

We are not looking for someone to just 'answer
s.' We are an established e-commerce business seeking a heavyweight Customer Service Operations Manager. Our department needs a complete structural overhaul. We need a leader who can audit our current mess, implement ironclad workflows, and build a data-driven department from the ground up.



If you haven't managed a team, built KPI dashboards, or successfully re-engineered a CS department before, this role is not for you.



Your Mission:

• Audit & Reconstruct: You will take our current CS department "upside down." Identify every bottleneck, every leak in our dispute process, and every point of friction for the customer.

• System Implementation: You will design and implement the SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) that our team follows. You ensure that how we work is scalable and efficient.

• KPI Ownership: You will define the metrics that matter. You won't just report numbers; you will explain why they are happening and how you are improving them (CSAT, First Response, Refund Ratios, Dispute Win Rates).

• Revenue Protection: You will oversee the management of payment inquiries and disputes, ensuring we maintain a healthy standing with providers like Klarna and PayPal through superior service and documentation.

• Leadership & Accountability: You manage the remote team. You are responsible for their output, their quality, and their adherence to your new structures.



Hard Requirements:

• Proven Track Record: At least 2-3 years of Management/Operations experience in high-volume E-commerce (Dropshipping experience is a massive plus).

• Structure Builder: You must demonstrate that you have previously built or significantly improved a CS department’s structure (not just worked within one).

• Tech Stack Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of Freshdesk and Shopify. You should know how to use these tools to automate and track everything.

• Data Literacy: You live in the numbers. You know how to turn raw data into actionable insights for the business owners.

• Fluent English: High-level professional writing is non-negotiable.



Application Instructions (Read Carefully):

To apply, you must include the word "SKYBLUE" in your response.



Crucial: Do not just send a standard resume. Along with your CV, please provide a brief summary (3-5 sentences) of a specific CS structure or KPI system you implemented in a previous role and the measurable impact it had on the business.

title: Crypto Customer Support Specialist
description:
About Us

We are reinventing consumer credit. We wildly reduce the cost of capital by using technology to easily tap into people’s

assets. Our first product is the world's cheapest credit card – backed by home equity. Using many patented technologies,

we sped up a process that usually takes 4-6 weeks and thousands of dollars down to as fast as 15 minutes and $0 to get.

Who are we?



We are a well-capitalized (over $250MM in equity funding) team of technology (Square, Microsoft,
) and finance

(Discover, CapitalOne, Goldman Sachs) executives with top-tier investors – Founders Fund, Khosla Ventures, Max Levchin,

NYCA, Sequoia, SciFi VC, Caffeinated Capital, etc.



Our team includes people who have built:

* Financial products (Square/CashApp, the earliest CapitalOne credit cards)

* Consumer products (
, Xbox)

* Technology infrastructure (Visual Studio, Windows & Azure, helped design the C++ & C# languages)

* Mathematics & science infrastructure (computational research at NASA’s JPL)



We are missionaries who like to work hard on important problems - and build products that become infrastructure for

society. We believe that using technology to lower the cost of capital for consumers is one of these problems - and if we can

do it, it could have an infinite impact on people’s lives.



Cultural Values:

1. Depth and rigor of thought - we try to be rigorous in our thinking & dive into the details.

2. Minimalist - we are spartan in our design, in our code, and even in our processes.

3. Speed of execution - we move fast & value decisiveness. We think speed drives quality.



Responsibilities:

* First-Line Resolution: Act as the primary point of contact for users requiring assistance with decentralized

solutions, providing fast and effective support to ensure satisfaction.

* Blockchain Troubleshooting: Analyze and resolve common user issues including transaction failures, insufficient

Gas fees, and slippage settings.

* On-Chain Guidance: Guide users in checking transaction status via blockchain explorers (e.g., Etherscan, Solscan)

and troubleshoot undelivered assets.

* Security & Education: Educate users on crypto security best practices, including 2FA, phishing awareness, and safe

wallet interactions.

* Account Management: Assist with user onboarding, KYC/KYB verification processes, and account access issues.

* Ticketing & Documentation: Utilize Zendesk and Asana to track and document interactions, escalating complex

technical bugs to Level 2 or Engineering teams as necessary.

* Product Advocacy: Collaborate cross-functionally to translate recurring user feedback into product optimization for

our Web3 features.



Qualifications:

* Support Experience: Minimum of 1–3 years of experience in technical customer support, ideally within the Forex, or

Crypto sectors.

* Crypto Literacy: Strong interest in blockchain and Web3, with a basic understanding of core concepts like Gas fees,

staking, and major public chains (Ethereum, Solana)

* Wallet Proficiency: Hands-on experience with non-custodial wallets (e.g., MetaMask, Phantom, Ledger) and major

cryptocurrency exchanges.

* Technical Communication: Exceptional spoken and written English — impeccable comprehension and clarity are

required for explaining complex crypto concepts.

* Tool Mastery: High proficiency with support tools such as Zendesk, Amazon Connect, and Asana.

* Analytical Mindset: Demonstrated ability to follow SOPs accurately while maintaining a problem-solving approach

to technical friction.

* Flexibility: Willingness to operate in a fast-paced environment with a rotating schedule.





Please send your resume to

title: Instagram Outbound Lead Generator (Coaching / Leadership / Burnout Prevention)

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment:

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: AWS Specialist/Junior Developer
description:
PLEASE READ UNTIL THE END TO APPLY!



We are seeking a dynamic and versatile AWS/Amazon Connect Specialist to support the development and integration of our system architecture, specifically geared toward providing advanced VoIP-based services to ophthalmology clinics. This position is ideal for a developer who excels in quick problem-solving, building integrations, and adapting to complex architectures.

In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with our team to build and integrate technical solutions for AI voice agents, Amazon Connect, AWS Cloud infrastructure, reporting, LLM, API integrations.



Key responsibilities:



Amazon Connect Support: Configure and optimize Amazon Connect for VoIP call handling, including live call management, scalability, and integration with other services.

AWS Infrastructure Management: Work with AWS services such as DynamoDB, S3, EC2, Beanstalk and Lambda functions to manage system workflows, data handling, and integrations.

Voice AI Integration: Support and integrate AI-powered voice agent for overflow/off-hours call handling, ensuring seamless call routing and data access.

Reporting and Analytics Development: Set up and manage reporting solutions for call center performance, AI metrics, and overall system insights.

API and System Integrations: Work extensively with APIs to connect and synchronize various platforms.

Software Development: Build different software solutions, for our internal and external needs.

Data Analysis and AI/ML Integration: Use language models and data analysis tools to analyze call transcripts, score agents, and generate meaningful insights for reporting.

Documentation and Knowledge Sharing: Contribute to internal documentation, ensuring clear and detailed records of processes and integrations.



Preferred Technologies



Core: Amazon Connect, AWS Cloud, Open AI and different LLMs

Programming and Frameworks: Python, PHP, Node.js

APIs: RESTful APIs, experience with third-party APIs



About You



Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).

3+ years of experience in software development or technical program management, with a focus on integrations, VoIP solutions, or AI implementations.

Demonstrated ability to troubleshoot and solve complex integration issues quickly.

Strong organizational and multitasking skills with attention to detail.



Desired Attributes:



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.

Highly organized and detail-oriented.

Strong leadership skills and experience leading cross-functional teams.

title: AI Mockup Designer (Lovart Prompting – Storefront Sign Visualizations)
description:
Overview



We are a signage company that designs and installs 3D LED storefront signs. Before producing a sign, we show potential clients a realistic AI mockup of how their sign would look on their building.



We are looking for someone skilled with AI image generation and prompting (especially Lovart) to create these mockups.



A typical project takes 30–70 minutes depending on complexity.



This position starts per project, but reliable designers can move into a long-term full-time role.





What You Will Do



You will receive:

• a storefront photo

• the business logo

• instructions for the sign



Your task is to:



• use Lovart to generate storefront mockups

• create 3D sign versions of the logo

• place the sign realistically on the building

• generate day and night versions

• export a simple vector file of the sign layout



Important

About 80% of the work is prompting Lovart correctly to generate the right storefront and signage look.



Graphic design skills help, but strong AI prompting skills are more important.





Tools



• Lovart AI

• ChatGPT (prompt refinement)

• Photoshop or similar

• Illustrator or other vector software





Requirements



• Experience with AI image generation

• Ability to write and refine prompts

• Basic understanding of lighting and perspective

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions





Output per Project



• storefront mockups

• day & night versions

• multiple sign variations

• vector sign layout





Accuracy is important — these mockups are shown directly to potential customers.
