title: Senior Web Designer (Webflow & Shopify) with Graphic Design Expertise
description:
Are you a highly creative Senior Web Designer with strong Webflow, Shopify, and graphic design expertise? Do you enjoy blending visual creativity with seamless user experiences? If so, we’d love for you to join the team at House of Designers.



How to Apply

If you're passionate about creating beautiful, functional web experiences and have strong skills in Webflow, Shopify, and graphic design, we’d love to hear from you.

Please submit:

Your resume

Portfolio showcasing web (links of websites) and graphic design projects

A brief cover letter highlighting your experience





 your application to 
 with the subject line:

Senior Web Designer Application – [Your Name]



About Us

House of Designers is a forward-thinking creative agency specializing in digital design and web experiences. We create visually compelling and user-friendly websites that elevate our clients’ online presence. Our team combines strong graphic design foundations with modern web development platforms, helping brands stand out through thoughtful design and innovation.

As we continue to expand our work across Webflow, Shopify, and WordPress, we are looking for a Senior Web Designer who can lead projects from concept to execution while delivering exceptional visual and user-centered design.

Position

Senior Web Designer (Webflow & Shopify) + Graphic Design

Responsibilities

Design visually compelling websites and digital experiences using Webflow and Shopify.

Create high-quality graphics, layouts, and visual assets aligned with brand and client objectives.

Transform creative concepts into functional and responsive web designs.

Collaborate with designers, developers, and project managers to deliver polished final products.

Develop wireframes, mockups, and prototypes for web projects.

Ensure all designs maintain strong UX/UI principles and modern design standards.

Participate in portfolio reviews and a paid design test to demonstrate your capabilities.

Stay updated with emerging design trends, tools, and technologies.





Qualifications

6+ years of professional experience in web and graphic design.

Proven experience designing websites using Webflow and Shopify.

Strong graphic design skills with a compelling portfolio.

Proficiency in Photoshop, Figma, and Adobe XD.

Proficiency in Shopify and Webflow

Experience designing responsive and user-centered websites.

Solid understanding of UI/UX best practices and modern web design trends.

Ability to translate creative concepts into clean, functional web layouts.

Strong communication and collaboration skills.

Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.





What We Offer

A creative and collaborative work environment where your ideas matter.

Opportunities to work on diverse and exciting design projects.

Professional growth within a forward-thinking digital design agency.

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills.





Join House of Designers and help us push the boundaries of digital creativity.

title: Performance Video Editor (Meta Ads Focus)
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled video editor who understands direct response advertising and can help us scale paid ads on
 and Instagram.



This is NOT a cinematic editing role.



This role is focused on:

• High-converting short-form ad creatives

• Iterating on proven winning ads

• Testing new hooks and angles

• Improving retention and scroll-stopping performance



We sell physical products via Shopify and run Meta ads at scale.



- What You’ll Be Doing



• Re-editing existing winning ads into new variations

• Creating multiple hooks from one base video

• Changing subtitles, pacing, structure, and CTA

• Making 3–5 new variations per concept

• Testing different first 3 seconds (VERY IMPORTANT)

• Optimizing for engagement + conversions



You must understand:

• Hook-first structure

• Pattern interrupts

• Fast pacing

• UGC-style editing

• Native platform feel



- What We’re Looking For



You should:



• Have experience editing
 / TikTok ads

• Understand conversion-focused editing

• Know how to improve retention

• Be fast and efficient

• Be able to follow creative briefs

• Be comfortable making multiple variations quickly



Bonus:

• Experience with Shopify brands

• Experience scaling ads

• Familiar with Meta Ads Manager



- Goal of This Role



To create new versions of proven winning ads so we can:

• Reduce creative fatigue

• Scale ad spend

- Payment



Open to:

Examples of ads you’ve edited (Meta only)

Your editing software

Your rate per video

Include the word “HOOK” at the top of your application so we know you read everything.

title: Outbound DM Setter & Discord Community Manager (Aussie Education Niche)
description:
About the Role:

I run a high-ticket, premiu
ntorship program for high school students in Australia (specifically targeting the HSC exams - bit not limited to). We help stressed students build elite study systems so they can dominate their exams.



I am looking for a hungry, highly organised Virtual Assistant to take over my social media DMs (Instagram/TikTok) and manage my private 
 community.



What You Will Do (The Daily Workflow):



- Warm Outbound DMs: You will proactively message every single new person who follows my Instagram/TikTok and every new student who joins the 
 server.



- Lead Qualification: You will use my proven scripts to have natural, casual conversations with students, figure out their pain points, and get them to fill out the mentorship application form - this is how I will be tracking your conversions.



- 
 Hype: You will welcome new members publicly, start daily conversations, post polls, answer questions and keep the community highly engaged and active.



Who You Are:



- Culturally Fluent: You must be able to text like a young Australian. If you use phrases like "Greetings Sir," "Kindly provide your details," or "How may I assist you today?" - this is NOT the job for you. You need to be comfortable saying things like "Yo," "Keen," "Heaps,", "For sure" and "ATAR" etc.



- Proactive: You don't wait for leads to message us; you hunt for them by welcoming new followers. You reply promptly, not letting the lead's motivation drop off.



- Organised: You never let a conversation drop or a lead slip through the cracks.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY - THIS IS A TEST):

I am shortlisting candidates immediately. Do NOT send a generic cover letter. To apply, send me a message with the following:



Subject Line: Put the word "DOMINATE" in the subject line.



Your Experience: 2-3 sentences max on your experience with Instagram DMs or 
 management.



The Vibe Check (Crucial): Imagine a new 17-year-old student just joined our 
 server. They haven't said anything yet. Write exactly what you would DM them to start a conversation and see if they are struggling. Show me your casual, Aussie tone.

title: DME Intake Operator
description:
DME Virtual Intake Operator – Overview



A DME (Durable Medical Equipment) Virtual Intake Operator is responsible for efficiently handling incoming DME orders via phone, ensuring a seamless intake process from order to fulfillment. This role requires a strong understanding of various insurance payers and their requirements, including obtaining prior authorizations in a timely manner to avoid delays in patient care. The operator must be familiar with a wide range of DME categories (e.g., mobility aids, respiratory equipment, orthotics) and possess basic sales skills to guide patients and providers through product options.



Key responsibilities include verifying insurance coverage, creating and managing physician orders, submitting authorization requests, and coordinating drop-shipment directly from manufacturers. The Virtual Intake Operator plays a critical role in streamlining DME services, ensuring compliance, and enhancing the patient and provider experience through efficient and accurate service delivery. We will Train, experience in Niko Health and DME Services a Plus

title: LMS/SaaS Trainer
description:
We are seeking an experienced LMS Trainer to design, develop, and deliver engaging training programs for our customers. The ideal candidate has strong experience in technical writing, creating digital SOPs, and conducting remote training sessions. Familiarity with SaaS products and e-learning platforms (especially LearnWorlds) is highly preferred.

The role involves creating comprehensive training materials, implementing effective training strategies, and ensuring tea
mbers are equipped with the necessary knowledge and skills to excel in their roles.



Main Duties and Responsibilities:

Training Development & Delivery

Design and implement training programs for remote teams.

Conduct virtual training sessions on company tools, processes, and SaaS platforms.

Content Creation & Documentation

Write and maintain technical documentation and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs). Using tools like Guidde, Loom & Komodo Docs

Convert SOPs into digital versions for easy access and use.

Create engaging training manuals, guides, and e-learning modules.



Platform Management

Manage and update content on LearnWorlds (or similar LMS platforms).

Monitor learner progress and provide feedback to improve engagement and performance.



Implementation & Continuous Improvement

Collaborate with managers to identify training needs and evaluate training effectiveness.

Update content and methods based on new tools, updates, or process improvements.



Technical Skills & Tools:

Requirements

Strong experience in technical writing and documentation.

At least 3 years of experience as a SaaS Trainer or similar role.

Experience creating and digitizing SOPs.

Familiarity with SaaS products and cloud-based tools.

E-learning course creation and interactive content development.

title: Real Estate Content Video Editor
description:
Job Posting: Real Estate Video Editor (Long-Form + Short-Form)



Part-Time / Contract – Remote



IMPORTANT: If you have ZERO experience creating content for real estate, and/or experience working with real estate clients, please do NOT apply. Thank you**



We’re looking for a dedicated, skilled, creative Video Editor with experience editing content in the real estate industry** who can turn raw footage into clean, polished, engaging videos designed to educate home buyers and sellers, build trust, and drive lead generation for real estate agents.



If you can skillfully edit both long-form (YouTube) and short-form vertical videos (Reels/Shorts/TikTok) with clean captions, strong pacing, and a modern style, at a quick turnaround time — you’ll be a great fit.



About the Role:

- You will edit ongoing video content for real estate agents, including:

           - Educational YouTube videos

           - Market update videos

           - Buyer/seller tips

           - Short-form vertical videos

           - Video ads for
, Instagram, and YouTube

           - Listing or neighborhood b-roll overlays when needed

We will provide raw clips, brand guidelines, examples, and clear notes for each project.



What We’re Looking For / Required Skills:

- Experience editing different styles of real estate videos catered to different avatars (luxury, first time buyers, home owners, sellers, motivated sellers, downsizers, etc

- Strong short-form editing skills: hooks, pacing, pattern interrupts

- Clean, modern captioning (not overly stylized)

- Ability to edit for multiple platforms:

         - 9:16 Reels/Shorts

         - 16:9 YouTube

         - 1:1
 feed (optional but preferred)

- Strong audio cleanup (noise reduction, clarity, leveling)

- Basic color correction

- Familiarity with real estate content (buyer/seller education, listing videos, etc.)

- Reliable turnaround time and communication



Qualifications:

      - Proven Video Editing Expertise: proficiency in video editing with a keen eye for creativity, storytelling, and detail.

      - Creative Vision: Ability to exhibit creative, innovative flair and storytelling to projects

      - Adaptability: Flexibility to adjust to changing creative directions and project requirements.

      - Ability to adjust editing style and messaging for distinct audiences—such as luxury buyers, first-time home buyers, distressed home sellers

      - Has the drive, hunger, and ability to do whatever it takes to materialize the creative vision and make deadlines



Bonus Skills (Preferred):

- Thumbnail creation

- Motion graphics

- Understanding of real estate compliance (no guarantees, no misleading claims)

- Experience with YouTube retention-focused editing



Responsibilities:

        - Edit long-form and short-form videos in a clean, modern style

        - Add captions using on-brand styling

        - Add b-roll, graphics, and minimal effects where appropriate

        - Maintain consistent pacing and high retention

        - Export in the correct aspect ratios and file formats

        - Deliver revisions in a timely manner

        - excellent/reliable communication

        - reliable internet/power connections

        - Organize files properly within Drive/Dropbox



Tools You Should Be Comfortable With:

         - Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro

         - Google Drive / Dropbox

         - Basic audio enhancement tools

         - Canva or Photoshop for thumbnails



Turnaround Expectations:

       - Short-form videos: 24–48 hours

       - Long-form videos: 3–5 days

Batch projects: timelines provided per batch



Reliability and communication is very important.



Compensation:

         - Rates will depend on experience and skills.

Please provide:

           - Your rate per short-form video

           - Your rate for long-form edits (
+ minutes)

           - Your monthly retainer options (optional)



How to Apply:

Please submit:

        - Your real estate editing portfolio

        - (Reels/Shorts + YouTube long-form examples required)

        - A brief note about your experience with real estate content

        - resume

        - The tools/software you use

        - Availability (hours/week)

        - upload 2–3 of your best short-form reels

        - upload 2-3 of your best long form videos

        - Your rates and typical turnaround time



What Happens Next:

        - Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test edit to evaluate creativity, style, pacing, captions, and delivery.



P.S., if you have ZERO experience in any of these fields, no portfolio of past real estate works, or cannot fulfill requirements-------please do NOT apply.  Thank you!

title: Documentary Video Editor (Long-Form Storytelling)
description:
The Project



We are a fast-growing digital media production house producing long-form documentary content built around investigative material, archival footage, and high-stakes human stories.



Our focus is on high-quality storytelling, not fast or disposable content. The goal is to create edits that feel closer to a premium documentary than a typical YouTube video.



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor who understands pacing, narrative structure, and how to keep viewers engaged throughout a long-form story.



The Role



You will work with scripts, research materials, and provided footage to craft tight, compelling documentary edits.



The ideal candidate understands how to build tension, guide the viewer through complex stories, and maintain engagement across 25–40 minute videos.



Key Responsibilities



Narrative Editing

Transform raw footage, scripts, and visual assets into a structured and engaging documentary edit.



Pacing & Structure

Maintain strong story rhythm to keep viewers engaged throughout long-form content.



Visual Integration

Use archival footage, b-roll, graphics, and other visual elements to support the narrative.



Audio & Atmosphere

Incorporate music and sound design to enhance tension and emotional impact without overpowering the story.



Collaboration

Work closely with our research and writing teams to ensure accuracy and clarity in the final edit.



What We’re Looking For



Story Instincts

You understand how pacing, timing, and structure affect audience engagement.



Attention to Detail

You notice small issues in cuts, audio, or pacing and refine them.



Professionalism

You communicate clearly and can work within a collaborative production environment.



Preferred Experience



Documentary or investigative content editing



Long-form storytelling edits



Experience working with narrative scripts



Submission Requirements



Portfolio

Please send 2–3 examples of your best edits, preferably long-form storytelling or documentary-style work.



Application

Simply message us the link to your portfolio. We will review all submissions and reach out if your work is a good fit to proceed with a trial task.



Note: Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Executive Assistant / Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)
description:
Location: Cebu (Remote)

Compensation: ?40,000 / month

Employment: Full-time, exclusive (no outside clients)



Overview



Saleslights works with ambitious founders in the United States to help them build visibility, credibility, and authority through strategic communication and founder-led content.



Our clients are typically:



• cybersecurity founders

• B2B SaaS founders

• high-growth service company CEOs



They are visionary operators who move quickly and think strategically.



They do not need task managers.



They need someone who can manage communication, 
ntum, and execution around them.



Your role is to become the trusted operational partner for a small group of founders and senior / elite salespeople.



Your Mission



You will manage up to three US founders or senior sales professionals and ensure they consistently complete a small number of high-impact activities each month.



Your job is to:



• organize communication

• keep projects moving

• motivate founder or sales leader participation

• maintain professional correspondence

• ensure key deliverables are completed



This role is closer to a Chief-of-Staff / Executive Assistant hybrid than a typical VA role.



Core Responsibilities



You will manage the following for each founder or senior sales professional:



Founder Communication



Primary communication channel via
.



You will:



• write thoughtful, professional
s

• summarize discussions clearly

• guide founders or sales leaders toward next steps

• keep communication structured and calm



Expect to write long-form strategic
s, not quick chat replies.



Founder 
ntum



Each month you will ensure founders or senior sales professionals complete:



• 2 short video recordings

• 5 document approvals

• up to 4 meetings



Your role is to:



• schedule

• follow up

• motivate

• remove friction



This requires strong soft leadership and persuasion skills.



Project Organization



You will maintain simple project tracking for each founder or sales leader.



Responsibilities include:



• organizing deliverables

• tracking approvals

• maintaining timelines

• ensuring no work stalls



You will operate similarly to a lightweight project manager.



Relationship Management



You will be the primary point of coordination between:



• the founder or sales leader

• the Saleslights internal team



You must maintain:



• professionalism

• calm communication

• clarity under pressure



What This Role Is NOT



This is not a typical VA task role.



It is not:



• data entry

• admin errands

• simple task execution



This role requires someone comfortable working with driven founders, executives, and senior sales professionals from the US and Europe.



You must be comfortable with:



• fast-moving conversations

• high expectations

• strategic discussions



Ideal Candidate Profile



We are looking for someone who has previously worked as:



• Executive Assistant to a CEO

• Chief of Staff style operator

• Agency Account Manager

• Founder or sales leader support operator



Key traits:



• extremely organized

• confident communicator

• calm under pressure

• professional writing ability

• proactive and responsible



You should enjoy working with high-performance personalities.



Work Structure



Each operator manages up to three founders or senior sales professionals.



Typical monthly workload per client:



• 2 videos coordinated

• 5 approvals managed

• 4 meetings maximum



This is a relationship and communication management role, not heavy operational labor.



Compensation



Salary: ?40,000 / month



Full-time role.



Because this is a high-trust position supporting founders and senior sales professionals directly:



outside client work is not permitted.



Why This Role Is Unique



You will work directly with founders and senior sales professionals building companies in:



• cybersecurity

• B2B technology

• high-growth services



You will gain exposure to:



• strategy discussions

• founder decision making

• international business operations



This is an opportunity to operate at the founder and executive level, not just perform tasks.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher: 



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Cabinet Vision Kitchen Designer / Estimator (Remote)
description:
ABOUT US



We are a Canadian renovation company specializing in kitchen remodels. We receive homeowner leads and prepare kitchen layouts, renderings, and detailed estimates before our in-home consultation. Our goal is to present professional, accurate kitchen designs that help homeowners visualize their new space and give our team a clear scope before the project begins.



We are hiring a long-term remote designer who can work directly inside Cabinet Vision to support our design and estimating process.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Create kitchen cabinet layouts using Cabinet Vision based on client measurements and photos

- Convert rough field measurements and reference photos into accurate kitchen layouts

- Adjust cabinet sizes and spacing to meet standard kitchen design rules and best practices

- Generate detailed cabinet lists directly from Cabinet Vision

- Assist with estimating using our cabinet price list

- Export layout drawings and renderings for client proposals

- Prepare design revisions after customer feedback

- Organize completed designs and project files in our CRM system



---



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



- Must have REAL, hands-on experience using Cabinet Vision software — this is non-negotiable

- Must have designed kitchens or cabinetry layouts professionally before

- Must understand cabinet components including fillers, panels, toe kicks, crown molding, and hardware

- Must be comfortable reading kitchen measurements and interpreting floorplans

- Must speak and write English clearly and professionally



---



BONUS SKILLS (Nice to Have)



- Experience working inside a cabinet shop or millwork company

- Background in kitchen design or interior design

- Experience with AutoCAD or SketchUp

- Experience preparing quotes or cost estimates



---



WORKING HOURS



This role starts part-time with the potential to grow into a full-time position as we scale. We are looking for someone who is reliable, communicative, and genuinely skilled in Cabinet Vision — not just familiar with it.



---



PAY



$5–$12 USD per hour, depending on your Cabinet Vision experience and the quality of your sample work.



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, you MUST do the following:



1. Include the word "Shaker" in the FIRST sentence of your application message.



2. Provide at least ONE of the following:

   - A screenshot of a Cabinet Vision project you created

   - A sample kitchen layout drawing you designed

   - A screenshot of your Cabinet Vision workspace



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We want to see real Cabinet Vision experience — please show us your work.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Graphic Designer to elevate our creative output with a primary focus on performance-driven creatives in Klaviyo. This role is full-time and in-house (remote). We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative but performance-aware — someone who understands that good design is not just about aesthetics, but about driving clicks, conversions, and revenue.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Create landing page visuals, banners,
 graphics, and other DTC marketing assets

- Edit and optimise website product images

- Develop new creative concepts and designs based on performance data and brand direction

- Produce variations of winning creatives for testing (different headlines, layouts, visuals, offers)

- Collaborate effectively with the Copywriter to iterate based on performance insights

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve angles, messaging, and hooks

- Monitor competitors’ designs to identify gaps or opportunities

- Upskill on DTC creative trends and platform best practices



Requirements

- Full-time remote, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Strong visual design fundamentals (layout, hierarchy, typography, color)

- Able to design with e-commerce marketing intent, not just aesthetics

- Comfortable creating multiple variations quickly for testing

- Highly organized, execution-focused, independent

- Skills in Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma (3D jewelry rendering experience is a huge plus)

- Experience with Klaviyo and Shopify

- Basic understanding of DTC copywriting



What We Offer

- Fully remote with competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays (following local PH calendar)

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Graphic Designer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Tell us about your most recent job. What did you mainly work on, what were some challenges you faced, and why did you d
 to leave?

2) Tell us about the tools you used, your process, and results relevant to this role.

3) Share a time you took initiative or solved a problem in your workplace. It doesn’t have to be a formal leadership role, just something you’re proud of.

4) Please submit as much of your portfolio as possible. Submitting more work will help us make a more informed decision. Work can include anything within DTC e-commerce industry, but ideally aligned to the role you are applying for. If you don’t have DTC experience, submit your best work portfolio. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. We want to see your ability to clearly explain what you did, your role, your reasoning, and the results of your work. You may optionally pick more than 1 project to highlight additional skills.

- What the project was

- Your specific contribution

- Why you approached it this way

- The results or impact (if any)



Keywords

jewelry graphic designer, e-commerce graphic designer, DTC graphic designer, performance creative,
 ads creative,
 ads designer, meta ads creative, meta ads designer, DTC designer, marketing creative, marketing designer, visual designer, klaviyo, mailchimp, omnisend,
 flow designs,
 campaign designs, lifecycle
 designs

title: Video Editor & Thumbnail Artist (Reels + Long-Form YouTube) - Education Niche
description:
About Me & The Vision:

I run an elite, high-performance HSC (High School) Mentorship program based in Australia. We don't do boring, traditional tutoring. We help stressed, overwhelmed Year 12 students completely rebuild their study systems so they can dominate their final exams, get top ranks, and get into their dream university courses.



My vision is to become the #1 authority for high school students in Australia. I have the content and the organic funnel, but I need a killer editor to take my raw footage and make it highly engaging, fast-paced, and professional.



The Role:

I batch-record my content, so I need someone reliable to handle a weekly cadence. Each week, you will be responsible for editing:



1 x Long-Form YouTube Video (approx. 8-15 minutes) + 1 High-Click-Through-Rate Thumbnail.



5 x Short-Form Reels/TikToks (approx. 45-60 seconds each) cut from the long-form or from separate raw footage.



What I'm Looking For:



- You understand pacing, pattern interrupts, and retention editing (Alex Hormozi / Ali Abdaal style, but tailored to my brand).



- You can create clean, high-quality thumbnails that actually get clicks.



- You are fluent in English and can add accurate, dynamic captions.



- You communicate well and hit deadlines reliably.



How to Apply:

I will be shortlisting 1-3 candidates for a quick interview. To be considered, please reply with:



1. Your Portfolio: Links to previous short-form reels and long-form YouTube videos you have edited.



2. Why Me?: A brief paragraph on why you want to work for an education/mentorship brand like mine based on the vision above.



3. The Test: Let me know if you are willing to edit one short 1min (final length) clip as a test trial so I can see your specific style (paid if successful).



4. Attention to Detail: Please put the word "EDUCATE" in the subject line of your application so I know you actually read this.

title: (Use ChatGPT) Travel Research & Logistics Assistant (US Multi-City Trip Planning)
description:
5,000 PHP Job - Easy, finish at your own speed!



Job Overview



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Travel Research & Logistics Assistant to help plan and execute a multi-city business trip across the United States.



This role is AI-driven and research-focused. You will work alongside ChatGPT and other AI tools to produce a complete travel execution plan that includes:



• flights

• hotels

• transportation

• business events

• schedules

• booking links

• cost comparisons



The final output will be a clean master document with everything organized and ready to book.



Once the plan is complete, you will also help execute bookings and logistics.



This is not creative writing.

This is structured research, organization, and execution.



Project Overview



The founder is taking a business trip across the United States from April 16 ? May 27.



The trip will likely include:



• Washington DC

• New York City

• Miami

• Nashville (short stop)

• Los Angeles

• San Diego

• San Francisco



The trip is focused on:



• attending business events

• networking with founders

• producing business content

• meeting potential customers



Your job is to help design and organize the best route, hotels, and flights while maximizing:



• value for money

• comfort

• safety

• efficiency



What You Will Do



Using ChatGPT and other AI tools, you will:



1. Travel Research



Research and organize:



• flights between cities

• train options (Amtrak etc.)

• airport comparisons

• travel timing

• route efficiency



Provide real prices and booking links.



2. Hotel Research



Find high-quality hotels only.



Rules:



• 4-star hotels preferred

• really nice 3-star hotels acceptable

• no cheap hotels

• no hostels

• no shared housing

• no rooms in someone’s house



Provide:



• hotel name

• neighborhood

• nightly price

• review score

• booking link

• pros / cons



3. Business Event Research



Using the event calendar we provide, identify:



• valuable conferences

• founder networking events

• SaaS / startup events

• cybersecurity events

• GTM / sales events



Evaluate:



• who attends

• networking value

• relevance to our business



4. Master Travel Plan Document



Create a clean master planning document that includes:



• full trip route

• city dates

• travel segments

• hotel options

• flight options

• booking links

• cost comparisons

• recommended final plan



Everything must be organized in one place.



We should be able to open the document and book the entire trip immediately.



5. Booking Execution



Once approved, help:



• book flights

• book hotels

• organize confirmations

• track receipts

• organize itinerary



Tools You Must Be Comfortable With



You must be comfortable using:



• ChatGPT

• Google Docs

• Google Sheets

• Google Flights

• 

• airline websites

• research tools



This role is AI-assisted research.

You must know how to use AI to work faster and smarter.



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• is extremely organized

• loves research

• is detail oriented

• is comfortable using AI tools

• enjoys planning travel logistics

• is proactive and fast



Bonus if you have experience with:



• executive assistant work

• travel planning

• event research

• logistics coordination



Output Standard



Your final deliverable should look like a professional travel operations document, including:



• itinerary

• logistics

• travel links

• hotel options

• booking links

• event recommendations



Everything must be clean, structured, and easy to execute.



Time Commitment



Initial research phase:



~10–20 hours



Execution phase:



~5–10 hours



Potential for ongoing assistant work if performance is excellent.

title: Video Editor or Graphic Designer – Fashion & DTC Brands
description:
We're a marketing agency specialising in fashion and e-commerce, looking for talented Video Editors and Graphic Designer to create scroll-stopping, high-performing ad creatives for our clients.



We need someone with a strong design eye who can develop original concepts—not just overlay text in Canva. If you're passionate about fashion, understand what makes ads convert, and can think creatively with limited assets, we want to hear from you.



What you'll be doing:



Design ad creatives for Meta (Instagram/Facebook)

Develop original concepts that align with each brand's aesthetic and marketing goals

Work resourcefully with product photography, brand assets, and minimal direction

Collaborate with our team to maintain brand consistency across campaigns

Adapt and resize creatives across formats quickly and efficiently

What we're looking for:



Proficiency graphic design or video editing tools

Experience designing for DTC fashion or lifestyle brands

Strong understanding of typography, layout, colour theory, and composition

Ability to manage multiple brands and meet tight deadlines

title: Video Agency VA
description:
The Role

We are looking for a sharp, dependable, and highly organized Virtual Assistant to join our core team. You will work directly alongside the Agency Owner and Client Success Manager to keep agency operations running smoothly. Your job is to take be deligated with tasks off the Owner's plate — so they can stay focused on strategy and growth — while ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



This is not a passive role. We need someone who is proactive, communicates clearly, and can be trusted to execute tasks independently and on time, every single day.



What You'll Do

Mon-Friday 9-5 Pacific Standard Time

Backend Systems & Documentation

Build and maintain internal workflows, SOPs, and process documents

Organize and manage Google Drive file structures, slack channels, dropbox, zapier, etc for HRW Media and clients

Create templates, reference documents, and operational infrastructure



Automations & Integrations

Build and manage automations using Zapier and similar tools

Connect platforms to reduce manual, repetitive work

Troubleshoot broken automations and document all workflows built



Task Execution & Support

Complete same-day task assignments from the Agency Owner — reliably and accurately

Assist with any virtual tasks currently on the Agency Owner's plate

Flag blockers immediately and ask questions before making assumptions



Daily Reporting

Submit a detailed end-of-day (EOD) report in Slack every working day

Break down each hour of your workday — what you worked on and its status

Keep all task updates and communications in the #va-channel



Who We're Looking For

The ideal candidate is someone who takes real pride in their work. You don't need to be reminded twice. You meet deadlines, communicate proactively, and write with clarity and confidence.



Must-Have Qualities

Excellent written English — clear, professional, and polished with zero errors

Highly responsive — replies to messages within 1 hour during work hours

Self-motivated and reliable — no micromanagement required

Strong attention to detail — organized, accurate, and thorough

Proactive communicator — you flag problems early, not at end-of-day

Comfortable working independently across multiple tasks and tools



Required Skills & Experience

Proficient with Google Workspace: Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail

Experience with Zapier or similar automation/no-code platforms

Experience building SOPs, workflows, or process documentation

Strong organizational skills — you keep files, folders, and tasks clean and consistent

Minimum 2 years of experience in a VA, operations, or administrative role



Bonus (Not Required)

Experience with Monday.com for project and task management

Familiarity with Slack for team communication and workflow coordination

Hands-on experience with Go High Level (GHL) — CRM, automations, pipelines

Background working with marketing or creative agencies

Experience supporting a founder or business owner directly



We read every application carefully. To be considered, please send the following to 



A brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

2–3 specific examples of backend systems, automations, or SOPs you have built

A short writing sample (3–5 sentences) explaining why you're a great fit for this role

Your availability and time zone

Your expected monthly rate (in USD)

title: Real Estate Transaction Manager/ Listing Coordinator
description:
PLEASE READ FULL DESCRIPTION AND FOLLOW APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS FOR CONSIDERATION



ABOUT US:

We are currently seeking 1-2 motivated and experienced Real estate Listing Manager/ Transaction Coordinator professionals as a dedicated hi-level support staff  for our Real Estate Team.  This is a full time position and the intention is for this to be a long term role.  Our current support staff have all been with us 3+ years.  



JOB OVERVIEW:

This position requires an experienced and highly skilled candidate who will primarily focus on supporting the real estate transaction process, ensuring smooth and timely closings. Previous Listing coordinator and MLS experience and in depth knowledge of the contract to close process is REQUIRED. Please do not apply if you do not have high level, hands on Listing and Transaction management experience. We are not looking fort general support.  Experience with eXp Systems is a plus. You’ll also provide general administrative support. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who is detail-oriented, highly organized, and looking to grow in the real estate industry.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Transaction Management: Oversee and support the full real estate transaction process from contract to closing, including coordinating timelines, documents, and communication between agents, clients, and other parties.

- MLS Listings: Create and manage property listings on Multiple Listing Services (experience with OneKey/HGAR MLS is a plus)

- Property Descriptions: Write compelling and accurate property descriptions to showcase listings.

- Administrative Support: Assist the with tasks such as managing
 inquiries, organizing documents, and scheduling appointments.

- Social Media & Content Creation: Post and create content for listings  on social media platforms.

- Client and Partner Outreach: Manage outbound calls, texts and
s to agents, attorneys, lenders and clients to assist in deal follow ups and transaction management



LOOKING FOR:

- Minimum 1 year of real estate experience, preferably with eXp Realty systems like SkySlope.

- Previous direct support of top producing listing agents managing listings from start to finish.

- In depth understanding of the Real Estate transaction contract to close process

- Experience with managing and responding to communications on behalf of CEO

- Ability to manage 20+ transactions at once and keep track of changing status and priorities. 

- Strong proficiency with Google Drive, MLS, CRM, Canva and eXp tools.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

- Highly organized, quick thinking and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.

- A positive, team-oriented attitude with a strong desire to grow and succeed in the real estate industry.

title: Senior Video Editor
description:
As a Senior Video Editor, you will be a key member of our creative team, responsible for crafting high-quality video content that brings properties, energy initiatives, and environmentally focused projects to life.



This role requires exceptional editorial judgement, including the ability to select the right footage, shape strong narratives, and edit with purpose to tell compelling visual stories. You will work closely with our videographers and marketing team, collaborating primarily through Adobe Premiere Pro, to deliver engaging, emotionally resonant video content that aligns with both brand strategy and client objectives.



Strong skills in 3D motion design, visual effects, and VFX design are essential, enabling you to elevate content beyond standard editing and create polished, cinematic results.



Key Responsibilities

Video Editing and Narrative Construction

Edit and refine video content including property showcases, energy and environmental campaigns, client testimonials, and event coverage.



Carefully assess and select footage to build clear, compelling stories with strong narrative flow.



Post-Production Excellence

Deliver high-end post-production including colour grading, audio mixing, motion graphics, 3D animation, and visual effects.



Create visually striking VFX and motion design using tools such as After Effects, 3D and VFX software, and AI-assisted platforms including Runway.



Storytelling and Creative Direction

Translate creative briefs into engaging visual narratives that enhance emotional impact and brand messaging.



Apply strong pacing, rhythm, and structure to maximise viewer engagement.



Collaboration and Workflow

Collaborate closely with videographers and the wider marketing team using Adobe Premiere Pro as the primary shared editing platform.



Incorporate feedback efficiently while maintaining creative integrity and high production standards.



Creative Development

Contribute innovative ideas, editing styles, and visual approaches to continually raise the quality of output.



Stay up to date with emerging trends in video storytelling, motion design, and VFX.



AI and Automation

Explore and implement AI tools to improve efficiency, enhance creativity, and streamline post-production workflows.



File and Asset Management

Maintain organised project files and a structured video asset library to support collaborative workflows.



Requirements

Proven experience in professional video editing and post-production, supported by a strong portfolio demonstrating storytelling, narrative editing, and advanced visual work.



Excellent ability to choose the right footage and edit it into a compelling, coherent story.



High proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, which is essential for team collaboration.



Advanced skills in After Effects, 3D motion design, and VFX design.



Strong understanding of colour correction, audio design, composition, and cinematic pacing.



Exceptional attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.



Strong communication skills and confidence working collaboratively within creative teams.



A passion for innovation, creativity, and pushing visual storytelling to a higher standard.



A degree or diploma in film production, media, or a related field, or a minimum of three years’ relevant professional experience.



To be considered for this role, please submit your portfolio of work alongside your application. We have also included a link to our own portfolio below, so you can get a feel for the type of content we create and assess whether your skills and style align with our output. -

title: Research, Design & Marketing Manager
description:
Ethics Insight is a specialist advisory firm that helps impact investors uncover hidden integrity risks and protect value in high-stakes deals. We’re looking for a Research, Design & Marketing Manager to support our founder, Rupert Evill, with targeted marketing (to gain access to clients, podcasts, awards, and speaking opportunities, content ideas, supporting our Substack management, etc.), design (Canva, templates, pitch decks, website knowledge a bonus), and research (knowledge management).



This is not a generic admin role. We need someone curious, detail-oriented, and proactive. We need someone who can keep the marketing and design ticking (driving it) while also helping structure knowledge (e.g., identifying client or speaking opportunities, themes for social media, finding gaps).



Who this job is for:

This role suits someone curious about risk, behaviour, and how organisations really work. If you enjoy spotting patterns, organising ideas, and helping turn thinking into influence (content, podcasts, models), you’ll enjoy this role.



Your mindset:

1. Curious about how people and organisations behave

2. Comfortable working independently and proposing improvements

3. Enjoys turning messy ideas into clear structures

4. High integrity and discretion



Responsibilities:

- Research target podcasts, clients, awards, social media strategies and platforms for submissions

- Draft & manage application materials, profiles, and supporting documents

- Design templates (for reports, pitch decks, social media, etc.)

- Organise and migrate content (e.g., social media posts and blogs to Substack) and flag key themes

- Organise knowledge resources

- Provide activity updates via Google Sheets

- Ad hoc support: scheduling, social media research, website or design inputs (nice-to-have)



Requirements:

- We value thinking over speed (human creativity, not AI, as we have an AI stack and software already).

- If you enjoy spotting patterns and improving systems, this role will suit you.

- If you prefer detailed instructions for every task, this role may not be a good fit.

Technical skills:

- Strong research & organisational skills

- Experience with outreach (podcasts, clients, awards, conference organisers, or client-facing submissions)

- Tools: Google Workspace, Google Sheets, Drive (essential); Canva, WordPress & AI prompting, knowledge base, and agents (nice-to-have)

- Excellent English (UK spelling), concise and low-fluff communication

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable asking questions or suggesting improvements (we're hiring for your brain, and would welcome your perspectives that we may be missing)

- Ability to work independently and respect confidentiality (NDA required)



Schedule & Benefits:

A) ~35 hrs/week, flexible (output is the metric for this role, we will not be 'clock watching', and we will respect your time), with some overlap in UK hours

B) ~$1,100 per month, depending on experience

C) 13th-month pay included

D) Paid PH public holidays & reasonable flexibility for time off

E) Long-term role with potential to expand scope. For example, if, as you learn the business, you are able to bring in new work or new opportunities, you would receive a 20% commission (i.e., potentially doubling or tripling your salary). 



How to Apply:

- Use this subject line: Manager_Research_Design_Ethics_Insight_[Your Name]

- Spend 9 Apply Points when applying. Applications without this will not be considered.

- Answer these questions in your cover letter:

1) What topic or problem genuinely fascinates you? Tell us about something you enjoy researching or learning about, even when you’re not being paid to.

2) Tell us about something you taught yourself recently. What sparked your interest, and how did you approach learning it?

3) Tell us about a time you disagreed with a manager or client but handled it professionally.

4) What is one thing Ethics Insight or Rupert should be doing that we are not?



Next Steps:

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a short, paid trial task: Identify 5 prospective clients and forums where they hang out - e.g., podcasts, conferences, etc.; further details will be provided to the applicants.

title: Tik Tok, Youtube, Instagram  Short Form Music Video Editor
description:
We're looking for a video editor to create short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) for a US-based electronic music artist who produces house and techno.



What You'll Do:

Edit raw video footage into 7–12 second clips optimized for short-form platforms. You'll handle creative cuts, transitions, and edits that align with current music and platform trends. You'll also log into Instagram to save drafts and post directly to YouTube Shorts. Due to geofencing, you will not need to post on TikTok — we handle that on our end.



What We're Looking For:

Someone who actually listens to electronic music — house, techno, rave culture — and understands the visual language and trends in that space. You should be comfortable with fast-paced, beat-synced edits and know what performs well on short-form platforms right now.



Experience editing for music artists or creative/music-driven projects is required. General business, self-help, or voiceover-style edits are not relevant here — please only apply if you have music-related work to show.



Details:



Long-term, ongoing role

Flexible schedule — you can batch edit on your own time

Per-video rate (open to discussion since clips are short)

Volume is up to you — edit as many as you'd like as long as quality stays high

Quality and creativity are the top priorities



To Apply:

Send your portfolio with examples of music-related or music artist editing work. Put "Music" in your subject line so we know you read this post.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly analytical US Senior Accountant to support our finance operations, primarily serving US-based entities. This role plays a critical part in ensuring accurate financial reporting, strong internal controls, and timely close processes in compliance with US GAAP.



The ideal candidate is hands-on, process-driven, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.



Role Summary

The US Senior Accountant will own key areas of the general ledger, lead month-end close activities, support audit readiness, and partner cross-functionally with Finance, FP&A, and business stakeholders. This role requires strong technical accounting expertise, attention to detail, and continuous improvement mindset.



Key Responsibilities

*General Ledger & Close

Own and manage assigned GL accounts, ensuring accuracy and completeness

Lead monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes for assigned entities

Prepare and review complex journal entries, including:

Accruals and deferrals

Revenue and expense adjustments

Depreciation and amortization

Straight-line rent

Reclassifications

Maintain and reconcile balance sheet accounts with proper supporting schedules

Perform bank reconciliations and investigate reconciling items



*Financial Reporting & Analysis

Prepare monthly financial packages and supporting schedules

Perform flux and variance analysis with clear business explanations

Support management reporting and ad hoc financial analysis

Ensure proper cutoff and period-end accuracy



*Technical Accounting & Compliance

Ensure compliance with US GAAP and company accounting policies

Support implementation and maintenance of internal controls (SOX exposure preferred)

Review transactions for proper accounting treatment

Maintain audit-ready documentation and workpapers

Support external and internal audit requests



*Fixed Assets & Multi-Entity

Manage fixed asset accounting (capitalization, depreciation, disposals, impairment)

Support multi-entity and intercompany transactions and reconciliations

Handle multi-currency accounting and FX gain/loss entries



*Cross-Functional Partnership

Act as Point of Contact (POC) for assigned entities or business units

Partner closely with AP, AR, FP&A, Payroll, and Operations

Collaborate with auditors and external partners

Support finance transformation and system improvements



*Process Improvement

Identify opportunities to automate and streamline accounting workflows

Support initiatives to accelerate the close (e.g., 15-day to 10-day close)

Assist in documenting accounting policies, SOPs, and onboarding materials

Contribute to ERP and system optimization projects



Required Skills & Qualifications

Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or Finance

Strong working knowledge of US GAAP (required)

Minimum 4–6 years of progressive accounting experience

Demonstrated ownership of month-end close

Hands-on experience with NetSuite or large ERP systems (required)

Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, etc.)

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

High attention to detail and strong organizational ability

Ability to work independently and meet tight deadlines

Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

CPA or equivalent certification (strong advantage)

Public accounting background (Big 4 or mid-tier preferred)

SOX/internal controls experience

Experience supporting US-based companies

Multi-entity and multi-currency environment exposure

Experience in high-growth or PE-backed environments

Exposure to AU or Singapore entities (nice to have)



Application Instructions

To be considered for this position, please submit the following:

*Your application letter

*Unrestricted link to your updated resume/CV



Subject Line:

USSrAcct – YOUR FULL NAME



Only applicants who meet the required qualifications will be contacted.

You will play a key role in maintaining compliance with GAAP and ASC 606, partnering closely with auditors and cross-functional teams, and continuously improving accounting workflows.

title: EXPERIENCED SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexi Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflow

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Video Editor
description:
Job Title: Part Time Video Editor for Meta Ads (Trial Project First)



About NOSSA Padel



NOSSA Padel is a premium padel equipment brand based in the UK, selling into Europe and the USA.



We focus on clean design, high performance products and an understated, confident brand feel.

Website: 



The Role



I am looking for a part time video editor to create short form performance ads for Meta,
 and Instagram.



You will be responsible for:



• Turning longer videos into short, scroll stopping visual hooks

• Creating short graphic based ads from still images

• Editing for performance and clarity, not just transitions

• Delivering multiple variations that can be tested for CTR and ROAS



If the work performs well and we work well together, this can grow into a more regular and potentially full time role. I am happy to pay a premium for someone who consistently delivers high quality, high performing creatives.



Communication and Working Style



Clear communication is non negotiable.



• We will agree response times and availability up front

• I cannot work with someone who disappears for hours without notice

• I am straightforward and expect the same in return



If we both commit to clear communication, this can be a long term relationship.



Creative Direction and Inspiration



You must be comfortable working to reference and adapting that style to NOSSA.



Before applying, please look at:



• 
 and their paid ads style and pacing

• Golf equipment brands such as Callaway, TaylorMade, and Titleist



We are also selling equipment, so I want a similar sense of performance, trust and premium feel.



The goal:



• Strong, simple hooks in the first 2 to 3 seconds

• Clean graphics, no clutter or gimmicks

• A premium, confident feel that fits NOSSA, not loud or messy ads



Trial Project



Before committing to ongoing work, you will complete a short trial edit.



We are asking for this because in the past we have invested a lot of time into editors whose work did not meet the level we need for performance ads. The trial is there to make sure we are a genuine fit for each other before any paid ongoing work begins.



For the trial you will receive:



• Raw footage

• An example of a previous edit that did not meet expectations

• Reference ads for creative direction

• A clear brief on the hook, message and desired outcome



You will deliver:



• 1 to 3 ad variations

• A strong, clear hook in the first 3 seconds

• Pacing optimised for Meta performance

• Correct aspect ratios for feed and Reels



If your trial work is strong and aligned with our standard, we will move forward with paid work and discuss an ongoing structure.



What I Am Looking For



• Proven experience editing performance creatives for Meta or TikTok

• Strong understanding of hooks, retention and pacing

• Ability to work with minimal hand holding once direction is clear

• Reliable and responsive communication



How to Apply



Please send:



• 3 examples of short form performance ads you have edited, ideally Meta

• Any performance results if you have them, CTR, CPA, ROAS etc

• Your typical turnaround time for a 30 to 60 second ad

• Your rate structure, hourly or per video



If your style and results fit what we are building at NOSSA, I will send you the trial brief so we can see how we work together.



Team NOSSA

title: Social Media and Marketing Virtual Assistant
description:
IF YOU SEND A GENERIC MESSAGE AND DO NOT FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED!!.



Hey there! A fast-growing e-commerce brand is looking for a motivated Social Media and Marketing Associate. Think you’ve got what it takes? Keep reading!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

* Manage AND GROW our social media accounts (Instagram and TikTok mainly). This isn’t just about uploading content—you’ll be responsible for growing our audience and boosting engagement.

* Create engaging posts and reels. We have tons of content you can use and repurpose to craft attention-grabbing social media content.

* Use AI tools to repurpose lifestyle images and videos (e.g., changing faces/people using our product, swapping backgrounds, etc.). You can work with the tools we’ve been using or introduce new ones you’re familiar with [you’ll be trained but previous experience on this will be highly valuable].?

* Use AI tools to create videos for socials and ads.

* Manage influencer collaborations: Analyze, select, and handle communications with influencers. Follow up, arrange samples, and track their content and performance.

* Include the word ‘honesty’ in the subject of your application. Yes, I'd like to make sure you're actually reading. You will be ignored if you don’t do this.

* Edit and create visuals as needed for: Amazon listings, Shopify pages, Special occasions (e.g., Black Friday/Cyber Monday, Christmas, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s/Father’s Day).

* Build Ad creatives for Amazon and social media platforms based on provided instructions.

* Other content/marketing related tasks.



REQUIREMENTS:

* Proactive attitude (yes, it’s a cliché, but we truly mean it!).

* Proven experience in growing social media accounts.

* Advanced graphic design skills.

* Video editing skills (suitable for reels and ads—nothing overly complex).

* Experience using various AI tools (you will still receive training)

* Advanced English proficiency (both written and spoken).

* Sharp and fast learner.



SOFTWARE PROFICIENCY:

In your application, rate your experience with the following softwares from 1 to 10 (1 = no knowledge, 10 = very experienced):



(Note: Experience with all of these tools is NOT mandatory; we’re just assessing your overall skill set — so be honest)



- Canva

- Sora 2

- Krea

- Adobe Photoshop

- Photocrack

- CapCut

- Vividly

- Veo 3

- EdgeFX?

- Nano Banana

- Adobe Premiere Pro



SALARY:

$700 per month



HIRING PROCESS:

* Initial chat interview (via Slack or?
).

* Zoom interview.

* Zoom interview with the founder.

* Pre-hiring test for shortlisted candidates (a small task).

* Part-time trial period (usually a few weeks) to see if we’re a good fit for each other.

* Full-time onboarding.

Tell me why you think you’re the right candidate for this role and direct your message specifically to this job post.

title: DTC Email Designer

This role is ideal for someone who is creative but performance-aware — someone who understands that good design is not just about aesthetics, but about driving clicks, conversions, and revenue.

title: Sharp & Reliable Customer Service Representative
description:
We are a fast-growing fitness clothing brand looking for A-Players to join our support team. As we're growing, we expect high ticket volumes and need someone who can stay on top of customer concerns with professionalism, clarity, and speed, without compromising quality. 



You’ll be part of a collaborative and supportive team where your contributions are valued and expected. 



Work Hours:



Full-Time: 40 hours per week



Shift Schedule: Right now, all the tea
mbers are on 9 AM-5 PM PH Time, Monday to Friday, but will change soon as we're looking to make our support team a 24-hour shift rotation. 



Must be available and responsive during shift hours.



Pay Schedule: Your pay will start at $350 on your first month, then will increase to $400 next month. Salary is paid every 2nd of the month via WISE. 



Key Responsibilities:



- Provide top-tier customer support via
 and social media DMs/comments

- Live Chat support will be added in the near future — must be open to this expansion

- Coordinate with suppliers regarding order or product concerns

- Identify and raise trending issues or customer pain points to the operations team

- Ensure all support tickets are resolved within the agreed SLA

- Maintain a calm, helpful, confident, friendly, and professional tone at all times



Requirements:



- Experience with Shopify (must-have)

- Excellent communication skills in English (written and spoken)

- Familiarity with customer support CRMs

- At least 1 year of experience in the E-Commerce customer service industry

- Able to work independently

- Strong sense of integrity, reliability, and accountability



How to Apply:

Please follow these steps carefully. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



- Send a link to your resume

- Include a short video introduction (1–2 minutes max) where you talk about your relevant experience and answer the question, "What is the meaning of success for you?"



Answer the sample customer cases below. Write your responses as if replying to real customer
s (no AI-generated content — we want to assess your writing skills and problem-solving approach)



Sample Customer Messages – Write Responses to All 5:



1. WHERE IS MY ORDER?!! I placed this 3 days ago, and I still haven’t received a tracking number. What’s happening with my order?



2. My item arrived damaged. It has a tear on it, or the seam is not properly sewn.



3. I don’t like the quality of your items! I want to return them for a refund!



4. I want to change the size of the item I ordered. And the shipping address I registered is incorrect. (In this case, the customer's order is already fulfilled)



5. I’m not satisfied with the items and the service I’m getting from you guys!! I will post this to my social media to let other people know about your crap to warn people not to order from your company anymore!! If you don’t give me my money back or I will report you to my bank!!



- To test your attention to detail and that you read the full job post, make the subject line “Hi” in Dutch and address your application to our Operations Manager.



We're looking to hire ASAP. 



Looking forward to your application!





Yan,

Operations Manager

title: wedding photo editor
description:
We are looking for a super-talented and responsible wedding photo editor to join our photo editing boutique team on a remote, part-time, and project-based basis.



The candidate has a deep, experience-based sense of color and composition, developed through years of practice. You should be able to achieve precise color consistency both on skin color and background consistency colors across large wedding galleries, show great attention to detail, and maintain punctuality and focus throughout editing work.



Responsibilities:

 • Perform color editing and creative cropping+straightening of wedding photos based on client samples 

 • Conduct self-checks and ensure the final gallery meets client quality standards.



Requirements:

 • Excellent command of Lightroom classic and Photoshop.

 • Strong understanding of color balance, lighting, and composition.

 • Solid portfolio showcasing previous wedding editing projects.

 • Ability to meet deadlines and communicate clearly in English.



Required Tools:

 • Active Adobe Lightroom Classic subscription with the latest version installed

 • Fast and reliable computer (macOS only)

 • Monitor with accurate color calibration



Please note that we are not looking for a beginner to be trained; we need an experienced, well-established professional who can deliver high-quality work and immediately start contributing to our current projects.
