title: Meta and TikTok Ad Specialist
description:
Job Title: Paid Ads Specialist 
 & TikTok) - Medical Spa Clients



Company: The King Of Content

Job Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Salary: $1,000 - $1,500 USD per month (approx. 56,000 - 84,000) - Based on experience & performance





About Us:



The King Of Content is a premier brand positioning firm in the US, dedicated to helping medical spa owners dominate their local markets. We are a strategic partner to our clients, providing them with the visibility and positioning they need to attract high-value clients. 



Job Description:



We are looking for a skilled and experienced Paid Ads Specialist to manage our clients' advertising campaigns on
, Instagram, and TikTok. You will be the expert in charge of the entire ad process for our medical spa clients, from campaign setup and launch to continuous monitoring, optimization, and reporting.



This is a key role on our team, and you will be working directly on high-impact campaigns that drive client growth. The ideal candidate is data-driven, has a deep understanding of the Meta and TikTok ad platforms, and has a proven track record of running successful campaigns that deliver a strong Return on Ad Spend (ROAS).



Responsibilities:



Campaign Management: Set up, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns across
, Instagram, and TikTok for our medical spa clients.



Optimization: Continuously monitor ad performance and make data-driven adjustments to improve key metrics like Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), Click-Through Rate (CTR), and ROAS.



Audience & Creative Testing: A/B test different ad creatives, copy, and audiences to identify winning combinations and scale successful campaigns.



Reporting: Track and analyze campaign results, and prepare clear, concise weekly and monthly reports for our team and clients.



Budget Management: Manage and allocate client ad budgets effectively to maximize results and hit performance targets.



Pixel & Conversion Tracking: Ensure proper setup and firing of Meta Pixel and TikTok Pixel for accurate conversion tracking and retargeting.



Requirements (Hard Skills):

Proven experience (2+ years) running successful paid ad campaigns on
, Instagram, and TikTok.

Deep, hands-on expertise with Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager.

Strong experience with pixel/tag setup, custom audiences, lookalike audiences, retargeting, and conversion API.

Strong analytical skills and a data-driven approach to optimization, with a deep understanding of CPA, CTR, ROAS, and other key metrics.

Experience with A/B testing ad creatives, copy, and audiences.

Familiarity with the medical spa, beauty, or wellness industry is a major plus.



Requirements (Soft Skills):

Excellent English communication skills (both written and verbal).

Highly organized and detail-oriented.

Proactive and able to work independently to manage campaigns and meet deadlines.

A team player who is open to feedback and collaboration.



Benefits & Perks:

Competitive Salary: A salary package that rewards expertise and results.

Performance Bonuses: Opportunity for bonuses based on hitting client targets (e.g., ROAS, CPA).

Paid Time Off: Paid leave for holidays and personal time.

Growth Opportunity: Be a core member of a growing team with opportunities for advancement.



How to Apply:



To show you have read this job post carefully, please use "KOC TikTok & Meta Specialist" as the subject line of your application.



In your application, please answer the following three questions:



1. What is the largest monthly ad budget you have managed across
 and 
 combined?



2. What is the best Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) you have achieved on a campaign in the last 12 months? Please specify the platform.



3. Briefly describe your process for testing new ad creatives.



Please also include a link to your portfolio or provide 1-2 screenshots of campaign results you are proud of.

title: Email Copywriter
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization

- Basic understanding of SEO and social media content strategy



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: 
 Copywriter – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

 to leave?

 marketing/copywriting, tell us about the campaigns you handled, tools you used, your process, and results. If you haven’t, what have you been learning on your own and how would you get competent quickly?

3) Share a time you took initiative or solved a problem in your workplace. It doesn’t have to be a formal leadership role, just something you’re proud of.

4) Please submit as much of your portfolio as possible. Submitting more work will help us make a more informed decision. Work can include anything within DTC e-commerce industry, but ideally aligned to the role you are applying for. If you don’t have DTC experience, submit your best work portfolio. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

- Your specific contribution

title: LinkedIn Social Media Manager (PH)
description:
ALL INTERESTED APPLICANTS PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM: 



PLEASE NOTE: This job is available to people in the Philippines only.



QuickTeam is a company that provides businesses with virtual employees to help them grow and become more productive. We provide virtual assistants, receptionists, and other support staff to help businesses take care of their day-to-day tasks and focus on what they do best.



By working with us, we will help you find companies where you can make an impact, be a part of their team for the long term, and join the QuickTeam family :). We would love to have you!



Position: LinkedIn Social Media Manager



Hours: 40 hours per week



Shift: Flexible

Salary: $6/Hour



Job Description:



As a LinkedIn Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for enhancing our clients' brand presence on LinkedIn, targeting professionals and businesses. This role requires expertise in LinkedIn as a platform, along with a keen understanding of B2B marketing strategies. You will curate and create content that connects with industry leaders and engages the 
munity while employing analytics to optimize campaign performance.

- Create compelling and relevant content tailored for LinkedIn's professional audience.

- Plan and schedule posts, leveraging LinkedIn tools and features to maximize reach.

- Engage with the community by responding to comments, messages, and participating in relevant discussions.

- Track engagement metrics and generate reports to assess the effectiveness of strategies.

- Stay informed on trends within LinkedIn and the broader B2B marketing landscape.

- Collaborate with the marketing team to align LinkedIn content with broader marketing campaigns.

- Identify opportunities for partnerships and collaborations within LinkedIn.



Requirements

- Proven experience as a LinkedIn Social Media Manager or similar role, focusing on B2B marketing.

- Strong knowledge of LinkedIn features, tools, and analytics.

- Excellent writing and communication skills with a focus on professional tone.

- Experience in developing content strategies tailored to LinkedIn’s audience.

- Strong analytical skills to measure and optimize LinkedIn campaign performance.

- Ability to create engaging content that resonates with industry professionals.

- Proficient in using social media management and analytics tools specific to LinkedIn.

title: Experienced Manager -Security Guard Business (We're not looking for a basic VA)
description:
About Us



We are a growing security company committed to professionalism, reliability, and operational excellence. Our services span both front-line security operations and the administrative systems that support them. We’re looking for a highly organized, process-driven Operations Manager to ensure both our backend systems and frontline operations run smoothly and efficiently.



Position Overview



The Operations Manager will be responsible for overseeing and aligning all operational functions of the company—both front end and back end. This role is critical to ensuring structure, accountability, and consistency across teams, systems, and processes.



You will be in charge of building, documenting, and enforcing SOPs and operational guidelines, streamlining software and tools, and ensuring that day-to-day operations are organized, compliant, and running without friction.



This role requires someone who is proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable taking ownership of systems, workflows, and execution.



Key Responsibilities



Operational Oversight



Ensure all front-end (field operations, scheduling, staff coordination) and back-end (admin, systems, reporting) operations are running efficiently



Identify gaps, inefficiencies, or breakdowns in operations and implement corrective solutions



Maintain operational consistency across all departments and teams



Processes, SOPs & Compliance



Create, document, implement, and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and internal guidelines



Ensure policies and procedures are followed consistently



Update SOPs as the company scales or processes evolve



Systems & Software Management



Streamline and manage operational software (scheduling, payroll, CRM-Belfry, task management, reporting, etc.)



Ensure systems are properly set up, organized, and used correctly by all team members



Act as the point person for improving workflows and system integrations



Team Coordination & Accountability



Work closely with leadership to execute operational priorities



Ensure teams are clear on processes, responsibilities, and expectations



Hold teams accountable to operational standards and deadlines



Organization & Continuous Improvement



Keep operational documentation, records, and systems organized and up to date



Proactively suggest improvements to enhance efficiency, communication, and scalability



Ensure “nothing falls through the cracks” operationally



Qualifications



Experience in the Security industry is a must



Proven experience in operations management, preferably in security, facilities, or service-based industries



Strong experience creating SOPs, workflows, and operational documentation



Highly organized with excellent attention to detail



Comfortable managing multiple systems and software tools



Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills



Ability to take ownership and execute independently



What We’re Looking For



A systems-thinker who enjoys structure and order



Someone who sees inefficiencies and fixes them



A dependable leader who ensures operations run smoothly without constant oversight



A professional who understands that strong operations are the backbone of a successful security company



Why Join Us



Key leadership role with real ownership and impact



Opportunity to help build and scale operational systems



Work with a growing company that values structure, accountability, and excellence



To Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief summary of your experience managing operations, systems, and SOPs.

title: Support - Community Moderator (US ET Hours)
description:
About Us



Wand is building the ultimate game companion — an interaction layer that transforms the gaming experience. Our platform empowers millions of gamers to customize and enhance thousands of games through innovative tooling. What began as a passion project for technical gamers has evolved into a movement, with our best-in-class desktop application becoming essential for players worldwide.



We’re not just building software; we’re crafting the future of gaming, where every player can experience games exactly as they want to. We’re creating an entirely new category in gaming technology that will fundamentally change how people play.



Role Overview



We’re looking for a Support - Community Moderator (US ET Hours) who thrives where gamers hang out and genuinely enjoys engaging with players day to day. This role is highly hands-on: you’ll be active in conversations, keeping communities welcoming and constructive while helping us understand what players are experiencing in real time.



Beyond moderation, you’ll act as a community pulse-checker — spotting trends, recurring questions, sentiment shifts, and emerging issues across our channels. You’ll surface insights early, help players feel heard, and ensure the right teams have visibility into what’s happening on the ground.



If you enjoy engaging with gaming communities, have strong 
 moderation experience, and like connecting patterns in conversations to real product or support insights, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

Community Engagement

- Be an active and approachable presence across Wand’s community spaces:

- Engage with players, answer questions, and guide users to the right resources

- Encourage positive discussion and help reinforce a healthy community culture

- Maintain an on-brand voice while adapting tone and style per platform

- Collect player feedback and surface common questions or concerns internally



Primary channels: 
 (primary), Reddit, YouTube, X 
),
, Instagram, TikTok, Trustpilot, forums, Featurebase



Moderation

- Keep community spaces safe, respectful, and constructive:

- Moderate 
 and social channels in line with community guidelines

- Enforce rules consistently (warnings, removals, de-escalation, bans when needed)

- Detect and respond to spam, harassment, impersonation, misinformation, and unsafe behavior

- De-escalate tense or emotional situations calmly and fairly

- Document moderation actions, edge cases, and recurring issues for consistency



Trend Spotting & Insights

- Act as a frontline signal detector for what the community is experiencing:

- Identify recurring questions, pain points, sentiment shifts, and emerging topics

- Spot trends related to releases, outages, pricing changes, feature launches, or policy updates

- Flag issues early before they escalate or spread

- Recommend improvements to FAQs, messaging, or support documentation based on observed patterns



Escalation & Cross-Functional Communication

- Know when and how to escalate issues effectively:

- Escalate urgent concerns (bugs, account issues, security risks, harassment threats) to the Support lead

- Surface high-impact feedback and recurring requests to Product and Engineering teams

- Coordinate with Marketing or Comms during sensitive situations (misinformation, heated threads, PR risks)

- Provide clear context when escalating: what happened, where, severity, examples, and community sentiment



Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of experience in community moderation or social/community support

- Hands-on 
 moderation experience (required)

- Active PC gamer with a strong understanding of gaming culture and online community dynamics

- Strong written communication skills and sound judgment under pressure

- Experience engaging with users across social platforms and public-facing channels

- Ability to identify qualitative patterns (themes, sentiment, repeated issues) and summarize clearly

- Comfortable handling multiple platforms and switching contexts quickly

- Reliable, self-directed, and consistent in enforcing rules and guidelines



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience moderating Reddit and other social platforms beyond 

- Experience supporting a gaming platform, live service, or software product

- Familiarity with moderation tools, bots, reporting queues, or helpdesk systems

- Experience documenting guidelines, macros, or internal moderation notes

Company paid PhilHealth or HMO

title: SEO / GEO Specialist
description:
???? FULL-TIME REMOTE: SEO/GEO Specialist for US-Based Marketing Team ????



Company: Drivers 1st (Remote)



***About the Role:***



Drivers 1st is seeking an experienced, detail-oriented SEO/GEO (Search Engine Optimization/Answer Engine Optimization) Specialist to join our remote Marketing Team on a full-time basis. You will be responsible for developing and implementing strategies to dramatically improve our organic search visibility and maximize the effectiveness of our content across all digital platforms. This is a critical role focused on optimizing our web content for both traditional SEO and modern Answer Engine Optimization (GEO) features, such as featured snippets, voice search, and knowledge panels, to capture high-intent users in the competitive driver recruitment market.



***Key Responsibilities:***



*Strategy and Optimization*

• Develop and execute comprehensive SEO/GEO strategies, including keyword research, content gap analysis, competitive auditing, and technical optimizations.

• Perform regular technical SEO audits on 
 and related sites, identifying and resolving issues related to crawlability, indexation, site speed, and structured data.

• Conduct in-depth keyword research tailored to recruitment, carrier opportunities, and hiring maps to capture driver-specific search intent.

• Optimize website content, meta tags, headers, images, and internal linking structures to enhance organic rankings.



*Content and Performance*

• Collaborate with the content team to ensure all new recruiting scripts, job descriptions, and web pages are created with SEO/GEO best practices in mind.

• Monitor, track, and report on key KPIs (organic traffic, rankings, CTR, conversions) using Google Analytics, Google Search • • • • Console, and proprietary SEO software.

• Analyze search query data to identify opportunities for achieving "Position Zero" (featured snippets) and better serving voice search queries.

• Proactively stay current with search engine algorithm updates, industry trends, and new GEO features.



*Technical and Link Building*

• Develop and manage strategies for acquiring high-quality backlinks and improving overall site authority.

• Ensure proper implementation of schema markup and other structured data formats.

• Manage and monitor all website redirects and error pages.



***Required Qualifications and Skills:***

• Experience: Minimum of 5 years of proven experience specifically managing and executing successful SEO and GEO campaigns with a proven track record of growing site traffic, backlinks, and ranking keywords.

• Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field preferred.

• Technical Proficiency: Expert-level proficiency with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Screaming Frog).

• Extensive experience with web analytics platforms (Google Analytics 4) and search console tools (Google Search Console).

• Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript as they relate to SEO best practices and site performance.

• Hands-on experience implementing and troubleshooting various forms of Structured Data (Schema Markup).

• GoHighLevel experience a plus

• Core Competencies: Exceptional analytical thinking, strong problem-solving ability for technical SEO issues, excellent communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail.

• Adaptability: Must be able to quickly adjust strategies in response to algorithm changes.



***Work Environment Requirements (Non-Negotiable):***

• Internet: Fast and reliable internet (minimum 100mbps) and a backup internet solution.

• Power: Backup generator capable of powering computer equipment for 8 hours in case of power outage.

• Workstation: Quiet, professional workspace free from background noise.

• Equipment: Noise-canceling microphone/headset, camera capabilities for internal meetings, and a capable smartphone.



How to Apply:

Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply by submitting their resume to 
 include "SEO/GEO Specialist Application" in the subject line.

description:
Bookkeeping & Accounts Virtual Assistant for Short Term Rental a company



Company: Stay Hosted



About Stay Hosted

Stay Hosted is a growing UK-based short-term rental management company managing 27 Airbnb and serviced accommodation properties across the UK. We handle everything from guest communication to operations and finance for our clients.

As the business continues to scale, we’re looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeping & Accounts VA to take ownership of day-to-day financial admin and reporting.



Role Overview

This role is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring accounts are up to date in Xero, and supporting monthly reporting for both the business and our property owners.

You’ll work closely with the director and play a key role in keeping the financial side of the business organised and reliable.



Key Responsibilities

- Reconciling bank accounts and transactions in Xero

- Tracking income and expenses across multiple properties

- Logging and organising receipts and invoices

- Preparing and sending monthly client payout reports

- Tracking and maintaining key financial KPIs (business-level and property-level)

- Assisting with general bookkeeping and ad-hoc accounting tasks as required

- Flagging discrepancies, missing information, or unusual transactions



Required Skills & Experience 

- Previous experience in bookkeeping or accounts support in the Short Term Rental sector (MUST HAVE)

- Strong working knowledge of Xero (essential)

- Experience with Zapier and automations

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

- Confident working with spreadsheets and financial data

- Organised, reliable, and able to meet monthly deadlines

- Comfortable working with multiple properties and transactions



Nice to Have (Not Essential)

- Experience with UK-based businesses

Hours & Pay

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (AU + US) — Excellent English + Confident
description:
— About the Role



We are looking for a confident Cold Caller / Appointment Setter to help us book demo calls with businesses in Australia and the United States.



You will be responsible for calling business owners, asking a few quick qualification questions, and scheduling demo appointments for our team.



We provide leads, a script, and a dialer, your job is to confidently speak with prospects and book meetings.





— About Our Company



EcoInk builds AI voice receptionist systems that help service businesses automatically answer calls and book appointments using AI.



We are growing quickly and need someone reliable who is comfortable speaking with business owners.



— Schedule



5 days per week (Monday–Friday)



Australia Calling Hours

10:00 AM – 1:00 PM PH Time (flexible)



United States Calling Hours

8:00 PM – 12:00 AM PH Time (flexible depending on region)



Exact schedule will be confirmed after hiring.



— Responsibilities



• Cold call businesses in Australia and the United States

• Speak confidently with business owners or managers

• Ask 2–3 quick qualification questions

• Book demo appointments in our calendar

• Log call outcomes and notes into Google Sheets or CRM

• Follow up with prospects who ask to be called later



— Requirements



• Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, natural)

• 1–2+ years experience in cold calling or appointment setting

• Comfortable handling objections and rejection

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet workspace for calling

• Good quality headset

• Able to consistently work some US evening hours



— Performance Targets



• 100–150 dials per day

• Track and report daily:

- Dials, Connects, Meetings booked, Shows, Call notes



—  Bonuses

Performance bonuses for:

• Booking 3–5+ meetings per week

• Meetings that convert into paying clients





— How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A 60–90 second voice recording introducing yourself and your cold calling experience

2. Your latest call statistics (if available):

- Dials per day

- Meetings booked per week

3. Confirm you can work both AU daytime and US evening hours

4. Confirm you have a headset and quiet calling environment

title: Remote Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Specialist - U.S. Custom Apparel Company ($800-$1,200/mo)
description:
We are Alien Prints LLC, a custom apparel and promotional products company based near Chicago, Illinois. We specialize in screen printing, embroidery, and DTF decoration, primarily serving construction companies and service-based businesses across the U.S.



We are building out our remote team and need an experienced recruiter to own the full hiring pipeline, from sourcing candidates all the way through onboarding and retention. This is a long-term position with consistent work, not a one-time project.



Open to full-time or part-time candidates. What matters is quality of work, not hours logged.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Recruitment (Primary Focus)

- Post job listings on platforms like OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, Indeed, Upwork, and LATAM-focused job boards

- Review incoming resumes and applications daily

- Conduct first-round video interviews (Zoom or Google Meet) to assess English skills, communication, culture fit, and role-specific ability

- Write candidate summary reports with your recommendation, interview notes, and key strengths or concerns

- Present only the top 2-3 candidates per role for my final interview

- Coordinate interview scheduling between candidates and myself

- Manage trial tasks and paid test assignments for select roles (design tests, mock sales calls, etc.)

- Source candidates from both the Philippines AND Latin America depending on the role

- Maintain a candidate tracking sheet or system to keep everything organized



Onboarding New Hires

- Run a structured first-week onboarding for each new hire (tool setup, expectations walkthrough, team introductions)

- Ensure new hires have access to the platforms and systems they need on day one

- Serve as the new hire's initial point of contact for questions during their first week

- Report any early concerns or red flags to me during the onboarding period



Retention and Performance Check-ins

- Conduct 30-day and 60-day check-in calls with all new hires to assess how they are settling in

- Flag any performance concerns, attitude shifts, or communication issues early before they become bigger problems

- When a hire does not work out, coordinate the transition and immediately begin sourcing a replacement with adjusted screening criteria based on what went wrong

- Keep a warm pipeline of strong candidates so replacements can be found quickly when needed





ROLES YOU WILL BE RECRUITING FOR



- Graphic Designers (apparel/screen printing focus)

- Salespeople and Sales Managers

- Customer Service Representatives

- Marketing Manager, Paid Media Specialists, Content Creators

- Video Editors

- Temporary/Contract Web Developers

- Other roles as the business grows





REQUIREMENTS



- 2+ years of experience in recruitment or talent acquisition (BPO or staffing agency background strongly preferred)

- Experience screening candidates for U.S.-based companies

- Excellent spoken and written English (you will be conducting interviews and writing candidate summaries)

- Familiarity with job platforms like OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, LinkedIn, and ideally LATAM hiring platforms

- Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple open roles at the same time

- Comfortable on video calls and able to provide clear, written candidate assessments

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for conducting interviews





NICE TO HAVE



- Experience recruiting for creative roles (graphic design, video editing, marketing)

- Experience sourcing talent from Latin America

- Experience with onboarding remote employees or managing new hire check-ins

- Familiarity with Google Sheets, Slack, Notion, 
, or similar tools

- Background in BPO or outsourcing industry





COMPENSATION



- $5.50/hour (approximately $880-$1,060/month full-time or $550-$660/month part-time)

- Open to full-time (8 hrs/day) or part-time (4-5 hrs/day)

- Flexible schedule as long as deliverables are met. Some meetings and syncs may need to happen during Chicago business hours (U.S. Central Time)

- Long-term position with room to grow as the team scales

- Paid via Wise or PayPal





HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please answer the following in your message. Generic or copy-paste responses will not be reviewed.



1. What types of roles have you recruited for, and for what types of companies? Be specific (example: "I recruited customer service reps and graphic designers for a U.S.-based e-commerce company").



2. If I asked you to find me a great salesperson right now, what is the first thing you would do and where would you look?



3. Which job platforms have you personally posted on or sourced candidates from? List them.



4. Have you ever sourced or recruited talent from Latin America? If yes, tell me about it. If no, that is okay, just say so.



5. Are you available full-time (8 hrs/day) or part-time (4-5 hrs/day)? When during the day are you typically available to work?



6. Briefly describe how you keep track of multiple open roles and candidates at the same time. What tools or systems do you use?

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company creating high-converting video ads for DTC brands in supplements, footwear, and more. We're looking for an AI Video Editor who can produce incredibly realistic, AI-generated video ads that look indistinguishable from real footage.



What you'll do:

• Create 20-50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Produce AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll content using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta and Google to create high-converting ad variations

• Independently concept and produce creative video ad variations that drive sales

• Assist with scripting when needed (scripts typically provided)



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads specifically for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI video/image generation tools like Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a portfolio to prove it

• Ability to generate extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Creative eye for direct-response advertising and what makes ads convert

• Self-starter who can independently produce high-volume ad creatives



Nice to have:

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools



This is a part-time position working 32 hours per week with flexible scheduling Monday through Saturday. 



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AICreator492'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut.

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced).

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"?

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential?

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 40,000 - Php 65,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Listing & Onboarding Associate
description:

Minty Living is seeking a highly organized, detail focused, and proactive Listing and Onboarding Associate who knows Guesty and 
 inside and out. This role requires someone who can navigate complex system behavior, resolve listing issues quickly, and maintain complete accuracy across all platforms. You will manage digital onboarding, listing accuracy, platform troubleshooting, and daily audits.

 has strict rate plan structures, so you must already understand how these systems work and how to fix problems fast.

• Manage digital onboarding from intake to live status across Airbnb, VRBO, Marriott Homes and Villas, Guesty, 
, Minty Living website, and other channels.

 rate plans, extranet behavior, and reactivation of removed or disconnected listings.

 issues, including relisting and rate plan fixes.

title: Shopify Product Page Builder/Developer
description:
About Us

We are a growing e-commerce brand specializing in health, wellness, and beauty supplements for the US market. We pride ourselves on clear, direct, and high-converting marketing. Our audience values straightforward messaging—they want to know exactly how our products benefit them without having to decode complex jargon.



The Role

We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented Shopify Product Page Builder based in the Philippines to join our team for 20 hours per week. In this role, you will be responsible for designing visually stunning, high-converting product pages from top to bottom. You will leverage AI tools like Krea and Gemini/ChatGPT to generate compelling imagery and write explicit, easy-to-understand direct-response copy that drives sales.



Key Responsibilities



Page Building & Design: Build, format, and optimize high-converting product pages directly in Shopify (experience with page builders like PageFly, GemPages, or Shrine is a big plus).



AI Image Generation: Use Krea AI to generate, enhance, and edit professional product images, lifestyle mockups, and visual assets that align with our brand aesthetic.



AI-Assisted Copywriting: Utilize ChatGPT to outline and draft product copy. You will be responsible for refining this copy to ensure it is highly persuasive, clear, and explicit.



Conversion Optimization: Structure the page layout to highlight key selling points, emphasize product consistency, and clearly justify the value of purchasing multi-pack bundles. Ensure the distinction between product types (e.g., clearly marketing capsules over tablets) is front and center.



Mobile Optimization: Ensure all pages look flawless and load quickly on mobile devices, where the majority of our traffic originates.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Platform Expertise: Proven experience building and formatting product pages on Shopify.



AI Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Krea AI (for image generation/editing) and ChatGPT (for copy ideation).



Exceptional English: Native-level proficiency in both spoken and written English. You must be able to communicate effectively with the team and write flawless copy for a US demographic.



Direct-Response Copywriting: Ability to write clear, punchy, and highly explicit copy. You must know how to translate abstract health concepts (like "longevity") into immediate, everyday benefits that a general audience can instantly grasp.



Basic CRO Understanding: A solid grasp of Conversion Rate Optimization basics—knowing where to place hooks, emotional triggers, and calls to action.



Attention to Detail: A meticulous eye for design, spacing, and brand consistency.



Compensation & Terms:



Rate: $5.00 USD per hour.



Hours: 20 hours per week.



Location: Remote (Philippines).



Start: Immediate 



How to Apply

Please submit your application with the following:



A brief introduction explaining your experience with Shopify and AI tools.



Links or screenshots of at least 2–3 Shopify product pages you have built.



A quick example of how you have used Krea AI or ChatGPT in your previous work.

We're looking for a talented Figma designer who understands what makes ecommerce pages convert and can create stunning designs that actually sell products.



What you'll do:

• Design complete ecommerce websites from scratch in Figma for multiple DTC brands (supplements, footwear, health products)

• Deliver 1-2 complete website designs per month with fast turnaround times



What we're looking for:

• Proven track record designing for DTC ecommerce brands with measurable CRO results you can share

• Expert-level Figma skills including building design systems and components from scratch

• Deep understanding of what makes ecommerce pages convert specifically in the USA market

• Strong visual design abilities combined with a conversion-focused mindset

• Experience developing branding for new ecommerce brands and creating cohesive visual identities

• Portfolio showcasing product pages, landing pages, and advertorials that have driven real sales results



Nice to have:

• Ability to implement your designs in Shopify using theme editors, Replo, or similar page builders

• Copywriting skills for creating compelling ecommerce page content

• Specific experience with supplement, health, or footwear ecommerce brands



This is a part-time position working 20 hours per week with flexible scheduling. You can work during your preferred hours as long as you meet project deadlines. Compensation is $15/hour.



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'FigmaConvert429'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk us through your process for designing a high-converting product page from scratch. How do you d
 on page structure, layout, and which elements to include?

2. What are the top 3 CRO mistakes you see most often on DTC ecommerce websites in the USA market, and how do you solve them in your designs?

3. Have you developed branding and visual identity for ecommerce brands before? If so, share an example and describe your approach to creating a cohesive brand experience.

4. How many hours does it take you to design a mid-length CRO optimized ecommerce product page? 

5. Please share a Figma link containing your best ecommerce website designs, including product pages, homepages, and landing pages you've created.

title: Cold Caller/Property Acquisition Specialist
description:
Distressed Property Acquisition Specialist



(Cold Caller & Closer | Real Base + Industry-Leading Commission | Build a Career, Not Just a Pipeline)



Are you ready to prove you can do it all—and be paid like you do?



Most of our top performers out-earn their base pay every month in commissions—because they produce, and they stay.

We’re building a long-term team of operators who own their pipeline, close their own deals, and grow with us as we scale.



What You’ll Do



100+ live outbound calls/day to distressed property owners (unpaid taxes, inherited, title issues, etc.)



Full-cycle ownership: From first contact through negotiation to close—no handoffs, no excuses



Pipeline management: You track every lead, every call, and every deal in real-time



Performance-driven: All numbers are tracked and visible; your income and advancement are tied to your results, not time-in-seat



What You Get



Real base pay (not a draw): To guarantee you’re supported while building your pipeline



Uncapped commission: Most of our best people double or triple their base every month—if you’re a producer, this is your arena



Leads, data, tech, and process: We remove the excuses; you bring the execution



Real growth: Producers become leaders, trainers, territory managers—if you prove it on the board, you move up fast



Long-term seat: We invest in those who consistently hit metrics and want a sales career, not a short-term gig



Who Succeeds Here



Operators who track their own numbers—and love the scoreboard



Professionals who crave direct feedback, thrive in a transparent environment, and want to build something, not just “do deals”



Anyone who’s performed in cold calling, full-cycle closing, and wants to see their income tied directly to what they produce



Who Shouldn’t Apply



Anyone needing long ramp-up, daily encouragement, or a “team sell” structure



People uncomfortable with public, daily reporting or being held to exact standards



Anyone not ready to own the whole pipeline—from hello to close



How to Apply (Must Complete Both Steps):



Resume: Clearly showing outbound calling and closing experience (include your highest daily call and deal numbers)



2-minute, unscripted voice memo: (no script, no edits)



Your name, country, and your personal record for calls in a day



Walk us through your best cold-to-close deal ever (steps, negotiation, and outcome)



Your personal system for tracking numbers and pipeline daily



Why you want a long-term, high-commission, high-performance sales seat—not “account management” or “just a job”



Applications missing either item, or not following instructions, will be rejected without review.



Bottom Line



If you’re a true operator who wants income, a real seat, and a future in a company that pays for performance—this is your next home.

If not, don’t apply.

description:

The ideal canadiate should possess the following attributes as a must:



Be Able to follow clear instructions

Be confident

Be persuasive

Be friendly and chatty

Be willing to learn

And finally have a good attitude to learn new skills and collaborate with us on new ideas.

The UK is 8 hours behind the Philippines; the role will be part-time initially, with a view to extending the hours once a satisfactory period has been completed (no graveyard shifts available).



The successful candidates will be responsible for meeting set KPI's and achieving the results set out weekly.



For the right candidates, we are a forward-thinking company, looking for valued people to join our small, growing company.



We would like to thank you for stopping by our job offer and thanks again for your interest in this job.



Best wishes

title: PPC Manager (Google & Bing Ads)
description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking an experienced PPC Manager to lead the development, execution, and optimization of paid search campaigns across both Google Ads and Bing Ads. The ideal candidate will have a hands-on understanding of both platforms and proven success managing large-scale, complex campaigns with significant budgets. You will be responsible for delivering results-driven campaigns that align with client goals while maintaining a deep understanding of industry best practices. Previous experience working at Google or a strong insider knowledge of Google Ads best practices is highly advantageous.

As a PPC Manager, you’ll be the go-to expert for all things paid search and will have a direct impact on client performance. The role requires a strategic mindset, data-driven decision-making, and the ability to maintain clear and effective communication with both internal teams and clients.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Paid Search Strategy & Execution:

Campaign Development & Management: Develop, launch, and manage paid search campaigns on Google Ads and Bing Ads, ensuring they are aligned with client objectives and maximize ROI. This includes campaigns on Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search.

Keyword Research & Audience Targeting: Conduct extensive keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience segmentation to identify growth opportunities. Develop comprehensive strategies based on these insights to optimize targeting and bidding.

Campaign Optimization: Continuously analyze and refine campaigns to improve performance metrics such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS. Implement A/B testing strategies for ad creatives, landing pages, and bidding strategies to maximize conversions.

Ad Copy & Creative Strategy: Work closely with the creative team to ensure that ad copy, creatives, and landing pages are optimized for user engagement and aligned with campaign goals.

2. Client Communication & Consultation:

Client Liaison: Serve as the main point of contact for clients, providing expert consultation on all Google Ads and Bing Ads strategies. Clearly communicate campaign progress, adjustments, and results to ensure client satisfaction and alignment with business objectives.

Performance Reporting: Regularly prepare and present in-depth performance reports, including key performance metrics (CPC, CTR, CPA, ROAS) and actionable insights. Use these reports to showcase campaign successes and provide strategic recommendations for optimization.

Strategic Guidance: Offer strategic recommendations to clients, advising on how to improve campaign performance, expand reach, or address performance challenges. Proactively identify opportunities for growth.

Client Relationship Management: Build and nurture strong relationships with clients, becoming a trusted advisor on paid search and digital marketing. Ensure high levels of client satisfaction, resolve campaign-related issues, and manage client expectations effectively.

3. Budget Management & Performance Tracking:

Budget Oversight: Manage and optimize client budgets across both Google Ads and Bing Ads to ensure campaigns are efficient and within budget. Track and report on budget pacing and ensure that client goals are met while maximizing ROI.

Performance Tracking & Analysis: Utilize Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics platforms to monitor campaign performance in real time. Assess KPIs such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS to ensure campaigns are delivering results within the defined parameters.

Optimization: Make data-driven decisions to optimize campaigns for better performance. Adjust bids, keywords, targeting, and ads based on performance trends and competitive insights.

4. Collaboration & Cross-Functional Alignment:

Team Collaboration: Work closely with the broader digital marketing team (SEO, Social Media, Creative, Web Development) to ensure that PPC campaigns are integrated into wider marketing and sales strategies. Align campaigns with broader business objectives, ensuring a cohesive approach across all digital channels.

Stakeholder Coordination: Collaborate with internal stakeholders to ensure paid search efforts align with company goals and support sales or product launch strategies.

Knowledge Sharing: Actively contribute to knowledge-sharing within the marketing team by educating peers about PPC best practices, emerging trends, and new tools or features in Google Ads and Bing Ads.

5. Industry Trend Awareness & Innovation:

Stay Current with PPC Trends: Stay up-to-date with the latest Google Ads and Bing Ads updates, features, and best practices. Attend webinars, conferences, and industry events to keep ahead of emerging trends and leverage new opportunities for clients.

Test New Strategies: Continuously evaluate and experiment with new tools, bidding strategies, and ad formats to ensure campaigns are always optimized and competitive. Propose new strategies to clients based on these findings.

6. Reporting & Data-Driven Insights:

Regular Reporting: Create and maintain regular performance reports, dashboards, and presentations to track campaign progress, analyze performance trends, and showcase ROI. Present these findings in a clear, concise manner to clients and internal teams.

Actionable Insights: Translate complex data into actionable insights that drive campaign improvements. Provide clear, data-backed recommendations to both internal and client stakeholders to guide future PPC strategies and decisions.

Attribution & Conversion Tracking: Implement and manage proper tracking systems to measure campaign effectiveness and provide accurate reporting on conversions, revenue, and other key metrics.



Qualifications:

Education:

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Certifications in Google Ads and Bing Ads are a plus.



Experience:

Proven PPC Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads. This includes experience in Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search campaigns.

Agency or Client Experience: Experience working in a client-facing role, ideally in a digital marketing agency, managing multiple PPC accounts with large-scale budgets.

Experience at Google (Bonus): Previous experience working at Google or within a Google Partner agency is highly desirable, particularly if you have in-depth knowledge of Google Ads best practices, new features, and insights from working directly with the platform.



Technical Skills:

Google Ads & Bing Ads Expertise: Advanced proficiency in managing campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads, including search, display, shopping, remarketing, and video campaigns.

Analytics Tools Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant analytics and tracking tools to measure, report, and optimize PPC campaign performance.

Data Interpretation: Ability to analyze large datasets, interpret complex data, and turn insights into actionable strategies to optimize campaign performance.



Soft Skills:

Excellent Communication & Presentation Skills: Ability to explain complex PPC strategies and performance data in a clear, concise, and accessible manner for clients, internal teams, and stakeholders.

Client Management Experience: Proven experience in building and nurturing strong client relationships. Ability to manage client expectations and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.

Problem-Solving & Proactive Mindset: Strong problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying and addressing campaign issues. Ability to think critically and take strategic action based on data.

Attention to Detail: High attention to detail, ensuring that campaign elements are precise and accurately reflect client objectives, even when working with large volumes of data.



How to Apply:

If you’re an experienced PPC Manager looking for a new challenge, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume, along with a cover letter outlining your relevant experience here. Include any specific campaigns or achievements that highlight your expertise with Google Ads and Bing Ads.

title: Inside Sales Agent - The Hart Team
description:
Ready to level up in a bold, fast-paced, and high-energy environment?



We’re not just hiring—we’re building a dream team of Inside Sales Associates ready to dominate the real estate game.



At The Hart Team, powered by eXp Realty, you’ll work closely with our CEO, Wayne Hartard—an ICON Agent ranked in the top 3% of over 90,000 eXp Realty agents—alongside a high-performing team committed to growth and excellence. You’ll play a direct role in driving results, creating opportunities, and helping shape the future of real estate. If you’re passionate about people, motivated by results, and thrive in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment, this is where you belong.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us:

- Competitive hourly pay (U.S.-based client) - Based on Experience

- Weekly pay + bonuses and incentives

- Paid training to grow your skills

- 100% Work-from-Home setup

- Fast-paced, supportive team culture



What You’ll Do

- Be the voice of success—connect, qualify, and convert leads

- Generate new business through daily prospecting

- Manage and nurture leads in our CRM

- Book appointments for the listing

- Crush your goals and earn big



What We’re Looking For

- 4+ years of Experience as a Real Estate Inside Sales Agent

- Excellent communicator – Confident, friendly, and clear on calls, texts, and
s

- Active listener – Understands client needs and responds thoughtfully

- Persuasive, not pushy – Builds trust while guiding conversations toward next steps

- Goal-oriented – Driven by KPIs (contacts, appointments set, conversion rates)

- Consistent follow-up – Never lets leads fall through the cracks

- Resilient – Handles rejection professionally and stays motivated

- Self-motivated – Doesn’t need constant supervision

- Coachability – Open to feedback and eager to improve
